title: Ensembles of Large Language Models for Identifying EQ-5D Studies in PubMed Based on Their Abstracts
summary: The rapid increase in scientific publications leads to the fact that manual study screening in systematic literature reviews (SLRs) is increasingly resource consuming, inefficient, and inconsistent. Classifying studies that clearly report health-related quality-of-life results, such as EQ-5D data, requires a high level of clinical interpretation and poses challenges for human reviewers. This study investigates the use of Google's Gemini and Gemma large language models (LLMs) in automating EQ-5D detection in the PubMed biomedical database based only on published abstracts. A multi-phase framework is proposed that integrates few-shot prompting, weight ensembling aggregation, and a soft stacking meta-classifier. Nine LLMs are evaluated on a dataset of PubMed studies manually labeled by two experts regarding EQ-5D reporting. The weighted ensemble of gemini-2.5-pro, gemma-3-12b, and gemma-3-27b obtained a 0.74 weighted F1-score and 0.74 accuracy, exceeding individually attained results. The ensembling of top-performing models improved the balance between precision and recall compared to individual models, while the soft stacking approach provided greater reliability and interpretability. Feature analysis shows that the probability results from the models are important in guiding the final predictions. The findings suggest that an ensemble-based LLM setup is a reliable and scalable approach for automating screening in biomedical research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于大语言模型集成（Gemini和Gemma）的多阶段框架，通过少样本提示、权重集成聚合和软堆叠元分类器来自动化系统文献综述中的EQ-5D数据检测，在PubMed摘要数据集上达到了0.74的加权F1分数和准确率，为生物医学研究筛选提供了可靠且可扩展的方案。
AI.motivation: 科学出版物数量激增使得系统文献综述中的人工研究筛选日益资源消耗大、效率低下且不一致；特别是涉及健康相关生活质量结果（如EQ-5D数据）的分类需要高水平的临床解读能力，给人工审阅者带来巨大挑战，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了一个多阶段框架，集成了少样本提示（few-shot prompting）、权重集成聚合（weight ensembling aggregation）和软堆叠元分类器（soft stacking meta-classifier）；基于PubMed数据库中由两位专家手动标注EQ-5D报告情况的数据集，对九个LLM（包括Gemini和Gemma系列）进行了评估。
AI.result: gemini-2.5-pro、gemma-3-12b和gemma-3-27b的加权集成在EQ-5D检测任务上达到了0.74的加权F1分数和0.74的准确率，超过了每个单独模型的结果；集成方法相比单个模型在精确率与召回率之间取得了更好的平衡，而软堆叠方法提供了更高的可靠性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于集成的LLM配置是自动化生物医学研究筛选的可靠且可扩展的方法；特征分析表明模型的概率输出在指导最终预测中起关键作用，软堆叠方法在可靠性和可解释性方面具有优势。

title: Trustworthy Multi-Agent Systems: Mitigating Semantic Drift with the Argent Signaling Protocol
summary:
When multi-agent LLM systems produce bad answers, not all failures are equal: some answers are grounded in the right material but incomplete, while others are simply ungrounded and should be stopped. Current retry strategies treat both cases identically (try again and hope for the best), leaving human supervisors unable to tell whether a retry was warranted or whether the system should have halted instead.
  We introduce the Argent Signaling Protocol (ASP), a compact machine-readable header that accompanies every AI-generated response with structured quality signals: certainty (@C), grounding (@G), stochasticity (@S), and an assumption index that classifies the evidentiary basis of each claim. These signals enable a controller to distinguish repairable failures from containment failures and route each case differently.
  We evaluate ASP in two modes. In standalone mode, a 27-question document-grounded QA benchmark over the Array BioPharma/Ono license agreement compares baseline prompts against ASP-instrumented controller actions across three local GGUF models. On Qwen~(0.8B), ASP improves pass rate from 11.1% to 33.3% and mean term coverage from 36.7% to 65.4%; on Dobby~(8B), ASP produces 4 fail-to-pass recoveries, raising pass rate from 33.3% to 44.4%; on SmolLM3~(3B), ASP alternates between repair and containment per question. Aggregate improvement is meaningful (12/81 to 21/81 passes). In multi-agent mode, an ASP sidecar sits between a retrieval agent and a downstream decision agent; the sidecar blocks 100% of ungrounded upstream outputs from reaching the downstream agent (24/27 blocked, 0 ungrounded propagations).

AI.tldr: 提出Argent Signaling Protocol（ASP），一种为多智能体LLM系统生成的响应附加结构化质量信号（确定性、接地性、随机性、假设索引）的协议，使控制器能够区分可修复失败与需阻断失败，并在独立和多智能体模式下显著提升文档问答的通过率与接地性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统在生成错误答案时，不同失败的根本原因不同：有些答案有正确的材料支撑但不完整（可修复），有些则完全没有依据（应阻断）。现有重试策略对两种情况不加区分地统一重试，导致人工监督者无法判断重试是否合理，也无法决定系统是否应停止执行。
AI.method: ASP协议定义了一种紧凑的机器可读头部，为每个AI生成的响应附带四个结构化质量信号：确定性（@C）、接地性（@G）、随机性（@S）以及用于分类每个主张证据基础的假设索引。这些信号使控制器能够区分可修复失败（repairable failures）与需阻断失败（containment failures），并对不同情况采用不同的路由策略。在独立模式下，控制器依据信号决定是否重试或重路由；在多智能体模式下，ASP sidecar位于检索智能体与下游决策智能体之间，用于阻断无据的上游输出传播至下游。
AI.result: 在基于Array BioPharma/Ono许可协议的27题文档问答基准上，独立模式下：Qwen (0.8B)通过率从11.1%提升至33.3%，平均条款覆盖率从36.7%提升至65.4%；Dobby (8B)实现4次从失败到通过的恢复，通过率从33.3%提升至44.4%；SmolLM3 (3B)在每个问题上交替进行修复或阻断；总通过率从12/81提升至21/81。多智能体模式下，ASP sidecar阻断了100%的无据上游输出（24/27被阻断，0次无据传播）。
AI.conclusion: ASP通过轻量级结构化信号使多智能体LLM系统能够依据失败类型采取差异化策略（修复 vs. 阻断），显著提升了文档问答的通过率和接地性。该协议尤其适用于需要区分错误类型以进行有效人工监督或自动化路由的场景，为构建更可控的多智能体系统提供了实用方案。

title: LaViSA: A Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity Benchmark
summary: Structural ambiguity arises when a single sentence admits multiple valid interpretations due to its syntactic structure, posing a fundamental challenge for language understanding. Visual scenes serve as useful cues for resolving such ambiguity, and Vision and Language Models (VLMs) need to be capable of deriving possible semantic interpretations from visual scenes. We introduce Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity (LaViSA), a benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of VLMs to resolve structural ambiguity leveraging visual scenes. LaViSA consists of ambiguous sentences, their disambiguated sentences, and corresponding images of these disambiguated sentences across seven ambiguity categories. Using LaViSA, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of diverse VLMs, including both proprietary and open-source models with varying parameter scales and reasoning capabilities. Experimental results show that although recent VLMs can leverage visual scenes to resolve structural ambiguity to a some extent, they still struggle with certain ambiguity types and visually subtle semantic distinctions, indicating remaining limitations in resolving structural ambiguity using visual scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LaViSA基准，用于评估视觉语言模型利用视觉场景解决句法结构歧义的能力，实验表明现有VLM虽能部分利用视觉信息，但在某些歧义类型和细微视觉语义区分上仍存在显著局限。
AI.motivation: 结构歧义（同一句子因句法结构产生多种有效解释）是语言理解中的根本性挑战，视觉场景可作为解决此类歧义的有效线索，但现有视觉语言模型（VLM）是否具备从视觉场景推导出正确语义解释的能力尚缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 本文构建了Language and Vision Structural Ambiguity (LaViSA)基准，包含歧义句子、其消歧句子以及对应的消歧图像，覆盖七种歧义类别；在此基础上对多种VLM（包括闭源和开源、不同参数量和推理能力的模型）进行了全面评估。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，近期VLM在一定程度上能够利用视觉场景解决结构歧义，但在处理某些特定歧义类型以及视觉上细微的语义区分时仍表现不佳，暴露出利用视觉场景消解结构歧义的固有局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明VLM尚不能完全胜任利用视觉信息消解结构歧义的任务，特别是对视觉上细微的语义差异敏感度不足，这为未来VLM在视觉-语言联合理解中的改进方向提供了重要参考。

title: SAGE-OPD: Selective Agent-Guided Intervention for Multi-Turn On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves student models by training them on trajectories induced by their own policy, making it a promising approach for mitigating exposure bias in agent training. However, most OPD studies focus on single-turn settings, while realistic LLM agents interact with environments over multiple turns. In this regime, early errors can alter future observations and compound across the trajectory, and standard dense token-level OPD becomes brittle, as it may over-penalize semantically valid alternatives, reinforce local degeneracies such as repeated actions, and propagate unreliable teacher supervision on off-distribution histories. We propose SAGE-OPD, a verifier-free selective intervention framework specifically designed for multi-turn OPD. Instead of applying teacher supervision uniformly across all turns, SAGE-OPD first observes environment feedback and uses teacher judgment to decide whether each student response should be skipped or intervened on. To further address compounding errors, SAGE-OPD weights token-level distillation by teacher confidence, reducing the influence of uncertain teacher distributions on corrupted or ambiguous histories. Finally, SAGE-OPD applies loss normalization to preserve the overall loss scale of standard OPD while retaining selective turn-level weighting. Experiments on agent tasks show that SAGE-OPD consistently improves over baselines, achieving up to a 13.3% relative improvement in ALFWorld unseen success rate over standard OPD. Ablation studies further demonstrate that turn-level intervention, teacher confidence weighting, and loss normalization provide complementary benefits. Our results suggest that effective multi-turn OPD should remain on-policy, but teacher supervision should be selectively allocated to turns where intervention is necessary and reliable.

AI.tldr: SAGE-OPD提出了一种无需验证器的选择性干预框架，用于多轮在线策略蒸馏，通过回合级干预、教师置信度加权和损失归一化，解决标准稠密令牌级在线策略蒸馏在多轮LLM智能体训练中因早期错误累积、语义合理替代被过度惩罚及局部退化强化等问题，在ALFWorld等任务上实现了最高13.3%的相对成功率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有在线策略蒸馏（OPD）研究主要聚焦于单轮设定，而现实中的LLM智能体需要在多轮环境中交互，早期错误会改变后续观察并沿轨迹累积。标准稠密令牌级OPD在多轮设定下存在三个关键问题：过度惩罚语义上合理的替代动作、强化重复动作等局部退化行为、以及在偏离分布的历史轨迹上传播不可靠的教师监督，亟需一种针对多轮OPD的有效方法。
AI.method: SAGE-OPD是一个无需验证器的选择性干预框架，其核心机制包括三部分：首先，通过观察环境反馈并利用教师判断决定是否对每个回合的学生响应进行跳过或干预，实现回合级选择性蒸馏；其次，使用教师置信度对令牌级蒸馏损失进行加权，降低在受损或模糊历史轨迹上不确定教师分布的负面影响；最后，应用损失归一化在保留标准OPD总体损失尺度的同时保持回合级选择性加权的效果。
AI.result: 在LLM智能体任务上的实验表明，SAGE-OPD在多个基准上一致优于基线方法，在ALFWorld未见任务上的成功率相对标准OPD提升了13.3%。消融研究进一步证实，回合级干预、教师置信度加权和损失归一化三者提供了互补的收益，共同构成了性能提升的来源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了有效多轮在线策略蒸馏的核心原则：应保持在线策略特性，但教师监督需要有选择性地分配，仅在必要且可靠的回合上施加干预。这一选择性干预范式为多轮LLM智能体训练中的暴露偏差缓解提供了新的方向。

title: LEAP: Layer-skipping Efficiency via Adaptive Progression for Vision Transformer Distillation
summary: Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) with Vision Transformer (ViT) backbones, such as DINOv2, have become essential for downstream tasks like object recognition and semantic segmentation. The immense computational requirements of backbones often necessitate distillation into smaller architectures for edge deployment. Feature-based knowledge distillation (KD) often suffers from the teacher-student gap; the student struggles to imitate teacher's complex feature map due to its limited capacity. To mitigate this bottleneck, we propose LEAP: Layer-skipping Efficiency via Adaptive Progression, a training curriculum for ViT feature-based knowledge distillation. By utilizing the teacher's intermediate feature maps as a sequence of progressively more difficult targets, our curriculum allows the student to build a foundational representation before tackling higher-level abstractions. Our results demonstrate that this paradigm significantly accelerates convergence through adaptive difficulty selection across various student model sizes and dataset scales. With our curriculum, the LEAP-distilled ViT-S achieves 90.1% accuracy on ImageNet-100, a +12.24% improvement compared with baseline. On ImageNet-1K, LEAP achieves +3.84% and +7.75% improvement for the instance retrieval task on the Oxford and Paris datasets, respectively. Furthermore, the curriculum enables 25.1% savings in training FLOPs and 21% savings in training time on ImageNet-100 by implementing early-stopping for teacher inference during the initial stages of training. Code is available at https://github.com/KevinZ0217/LEAP

AI.tldr: 提出LEAP训练课程，通过自适应渐进式层级跳过策略对ViT进行基于特征的知识蒸馏，使学生模型能逐步学习教师模型从低级到高级的中间特征表示，在ImageNet-100上实现ViT-S +12.24%的准确率提升，并节省25.1%的训练FLOPs。
AI.motivation: Vision Foundation Models（如DINOv2）基于ViT骨干网络在诸多下游任务中表现优异，但其巨大的计算需求阻碍了边缘端部署，因此需要将其蒸馏到更小的学生模型中。然而，基于特征的知识蒸馏面临教师-学生差距瓶颈：由于学生模型容量有限，难以有效模仿教师复杂的特征图，亟需一种能缓解该差距的蒸馏训练策略。
AI.method: 提出LEAP（Layer-skipping Efficiency via Adaptive Progression）训练课程，将教师模型的中间特征图序列作为渐进式难度递增的学习目标。课程设计允许学生先建立基础表征，再逐步学习更高层次的抽象特征，并通过自适应难度选择机制根据学生模型规模和数据集规模动态调整学习进程，从而加速收敛。
AI.result: LEAP蒸馏的ViT-S在ImageNet-100上达到90.1%准确率，较基线提升12.24%。在ImageNet-1K上，针对实例检索任务，在Oxford和Paris数据集上分别提升3.84%和7.75%。此外，通过在训练初期对教师推理实现早停策略，课程在ImageNet-100上节省了25.1%的训练FLOPs和21%的训练时间。
AI.conclusion: LEAP通过渐进式课程学习有效缓解了特征蒸馏中的教师-学生差距，在不同模型规模和数据集规模下均显著加速收敛并提升性能，同时通过早停策略降低了训练开销，为VFM的轻量化边缘部署提供了一条高效途径。

title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure. To be published in the 2026 IEEE Symposium on Agentic Services which is part of the IEEE Conference on Web Services
summary: Autonomous agentic AI systems driven by Large Language Models (LLMs) introduce a new class of security, privacy, and compliance challenges: an agent that can invoke tools, manipulate data, install software, and coordinate with peer agents across organizational boundaries must be constrained not just by authentication and access control, but by the full structure of enterprise governance. This includes specifying what agents are permitted and prohibited from doing, what they areobliged to do after certain actions (e.g., notify the CISO), under what conditions a standing obligation may be waived, and which rules take precedence when policies conflict. This governance problem exceeds what current policy engines provide. Systems such as XACML, Rego, and Cedar address only the permit/prohibit subset of this governance structure. They do not provide obligation lifecycle management, meta-policy conflict resolution, dispensations that waive obligations in specific circumstances, and ontological reasoning over domain class hierarchies commonly found in applications such as healthcare, cybersecurity, or data privacy. We propose AgenticRei, which realizes key governance requirements such as obligations, dispensations, policy conflict resolutions, and reasoning over policies, as well as the basic permit/prohibit constraints. We use a deontic policy language built on the Rei framework, expressed as OWL (Web Ontology Language) and evaluated at runtime by a high-performance logic engine entirely outside the LLM. The same pipeline governs both tool invocations by the agent and agent-to-agent messages. We show through examples that deontic policies capture governance constraints around security and privacy that mostly cannot be expressed in current production engines. Our approach composes naturally with industry-standard frameworks like A2AS.

AI.tldr: 提出AgenticRei框架，利用基于Rei的道义策略语言（以OWL表示）在LLM驱动的自主智能体外运行时进行策略推理，支持许可/禁止、义务生命周期管理、豁免、元策略冲突解决及领域本体推理，弥补了现有策略引擎在企业治理场景中的能力缺口。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的自主智能体系统在调用工具、操作数据、安装软件及跨组织协调时，面临超出传统认证与访问控制的企业治理需求，包括义务管理、豁免条件、策略冲突解决及领域本体推理。现有策略引擎（如XACML、Rego、Cedar）仅支持许可/禁止约束，无法处理义务生命周期管理、元策略冲突解决、特定情境下的义务豁免以及对医疗、网络安全等应用中的领域类层次结构进行本体推理。
AI.method: 提出AgenticRei框架，采用基于Rei框架的道义策略语言，以OWL（Web Ontology Language）表示策略，并在LLM外部由高性能逻辑引擎在运行时进行评估。该管道同时治理智能体的工具调用和智能体间消息传递，支持许可/禁止、义务、豁免、策略冲突解决及策略推理等核心治理需求。
AI.result: 通过示例表明，道义策略能够捕获安全与隐私相关的治理约束，而这些约束大部分无法在现有生产级策略引擎中表达。AgenticRei框架能够与A2AS等行业标准框架自然组合，实现了对许可/禁止之外更完整治理结构的支持。
AI.conclusion: 自主智能体的企业治理需要超越传统策略引擎的能力范畴，AgenticRei通过将道义策略与OWL本体推理结合，在LLM外部实现运行时治理，为安全、隐私与合规约束提供了可表达、可执行的解决方案，并可与现有行业标准框架互操作。

title: TerraMARS: A Domain-Adapted Small-Language-Model Pipeline for Mars Terraforming Literature
summary: Researchers are interested in learning about Mars so that it may eventually become habitable for humans. To achieve this, there is a need for comprehensive knowledge of the planet's atmosphere, hydrology, surface chemistry, radiation environment, and spatial features through the scientific literature. These contain valuable information and meaningful quantitative constraints that can be used in other models and studies, such as habitability assessment and future terraforming studies. We present TerraMARS, an end-to-end information extraction pipeline that combines a domain-adapted Small Language Model to answer Mars terraforming-related questions and convert unstructured Mars science text into machine-readable structured outputs in JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) format. A corpus of open-access papers is collected and processed using a multistage retrieval and chunking framework. Google Gemma 3 1B was adapted to the domain using Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) fine-tuning on Mars-specific question-answering and information extraction datasets. The resulting pipeline generates both types of output and provides a foundation for integrating knowledge from scientific literature into downstream applications like digital twins and habitability modeling for Mars. The output from this pipeline looks promising, but further improvements are needed to increase extraction accuracy and factual consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TerraMARS，一个端到端信息抽取流水线，结合领域适配的小语言模型（Google Gemma 3 1B）与QLoRA微调，将火星科学文献中的非结构化文本转换为结构化JSON格式并回答火星地球化相关问题，为数字孪生和宜居性建模提供知识基础。
AI.motivation: 目前火星科学研究文献中包含大量关于大气、水文、表面化学、辐射环境和空间特征的有价值定量信息，但这些知识以非结构化文本形式存在，难以被其他模型和下游应用（如宜居性评估和地球化研究）直接利用。现有工作缺乏能够高效地从火星科学文献中提取结构化信息并回答特定领域问题的端到端系统。
AI.method: TerraMARS采用多阶段检索与分块框架处理开放获取论文语料，以Google Gemma 3 1B为基座模型，通过量化低秩适配（QLoRA）技术在火星特定的问答和信息抽取数据集上进行领域微调，构建了一个既能回答火星地球化相关问题又能将非结构化科学文本转换为JSON格式结构化输出的信息抽取流水线。
AI.result: 该流水线能够同时生成问答输出和结构化JSON输出，初步结果显示出良好的应用潜力，但在抽取准确性和事实一致性方面仍有待进一步改进。
AI.conclusion: TerraMARS为将火星科学文献知识整合到数字孪生和宜居性建模等下游应用中提供了可行的技术基础，证明了小语言模型结合领域微调在特定科学信息抽取任务中的有效性，同时指出未来需重点提升抽取精度和事实一致性。

title: LooseControlVideo: Directorial Video Control using Spatial Blocking
summary: Precise 3D spatial orchestration in text-to-video generation remains a significant challenge, particularly for multi-object scenes where semantic layout and temporal dynamics are often entangled. While existing depth-conditioned models achieve good structural fidelity, they necessitate dense, frame-accurate guidance that is labor-intensive to author for dynamic events involving deformable objects. We present LooseControlVideo, a framework that enables intuitive and expressive control by using sparse, oriented 3D boxes as a "blocking" proxy. This allows users to author high-level layout and trajectory while leveraging a video generative model to generate realistic occlusions, dynamics and interactions. We achieve this by fine-tuning a Wan 2.2 backbone on a video dataset annotated with DNOCS, a novel encoding for 3D size, orientation and depth-ordered occlusions. Furthermore, our method allows for localized refinement, such as adjusting a jump trajectory or adding an interaction, with minimal disruption to the global scene context. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes, HO-3D, and BEHAVE benchmarks demonstrate that LooseControlVideo significantly outperforms existing 2D-box and flow-based baselines. Our findings indicate a 1.2x to 3x improvement in Trajectory Error; 2x improvement in Rigid Motion Consistency; and a 1.5x to 2x increase in Occlusion Accuracy over current state-of-the-art layout-conditioned models, demonstrating that oriented 3D primitives provide good geometric prior for complex, multi-agent video authoring.

AI.tldr: LooseControlVideo 提出利用稀疏定向3D框作为“阻挡”代理，并结合DNOCS编码与Wan 2.2微调，实现多对象视频生成中布局、轨迹与遮挡的直观控制，在Trajectory Error、Rigid Motion Consistency和Occlusion Accuracy上超越当前最优方法1.2至3倍。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成视频方法在多对象场景中难以精确编排3D空间语义布局与时序动态，深度条件模型需要密集逐帧指导，难以高效处理涉及可变形物体的动态事件，亟需一种轻量且表达能力强的控制框架。
AI.method: 提出LooseControlVideo框架，以稀疏、带方向的3D框作为“阻挡（blocking）”代理，让用户定义高层布局与轨迹并利用生成模型自动补全遮挡、动态与交互；通过在Wan 2.2骨干上微调，并引入DNOCS编码对3D尺寸、方向及深度排序遮挡进行联合建模，同时支持局部精修以最小化对全局场景的干扰。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、HO-3D和BEHAVE基准上的广泛评估表明，LooseControlVideo显著优于现有基于2D框和光流的基线方法：Trajectory Error提升1.2至3倍，Rigid Motion Consistency提升2倍，Occlusion Accuracy提升1.5至2倍。
AI.conclusion: 实验证明定向3D基元为复杂多智能体视频创作提供了良好的几何先验，稀疏3D框结合深度排序编码能有效解耦布局与动态，为可交互的高层视频编辑奠定了实用基础。

title: Hidden Anchors in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
summary: Multi-agent LLM deliberation, where agents exchange and revise answers over several rounds, is increasingly used to improve reasoning and accuracy, yet how and why it works is rarely modelled. Such deliberation mirrors how humans reach decisions. As social animals we are pulled both by the group, the herd effect that classical opinion-dynamics models such as DeGroot and Friedkin--Johnsen capture, and by our own internal belief, which they do not. We model multi-agent deliberation as a closed-loop dynamical system in which each agent carries a hidden internal belief, its anchor, that continually pulls its opinion regardless of its neighbours. We show this anchor can be recovered from the deliberation alone, and that it explains a behaviour classical consensus rules forbid: an agent's confidence in the correct answer can climb past where any agent started, escaping the space (convexhull) formed by the initial beliefs. Checking whether the recovered anchor also predicts held-out runs (generalizes) gives a simple test for when a model is truly driven bysuch an anchor. Across three open-weight model families this is a spectrum, not all-or-nothing. All anchors' influence are about equally strongly, but they differ in where the anchor sits, and only when it sits far from the initial opinions does deliberation escape the hull and need the full closed-loop model.

AI.tldr: 该论文将多智能体LLM讨论建模为闭环动力系统，每个智能体携带一个隐式内部信念（锚点），该锚点持续拉取其意见使其脱离初始信念的凸包，并通过锚点恢复与泛化测试验证了该模型的有效性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM讨论已被广泛用于提升推理准确性，但其工作机制缺乏理论建模。现有舆论动力学模型（如DeGroot、Friedkin-Johnsen）仅刻画群体对个体的影响（羊群效应），却忽略了智能体内部固有信念的持续牵引作用，这是多智能体LLM讨论中未被建模的关键因素。
AI.method: 提出一个闭环动力系统模型，将每个智能体建模为携带一个隐藏的内部信念（锚点），该锚点持续拉取其意见而非仅受邻居影响。通过讨论过程恢复该锚点，并利用锚点对未参与讨论的轮次进行泛化测试来验证模型。在多个开源模型家族上进行了系统性实验。
AI.result: 实验发现，智能体对正确答案的置信度可以超过任意初始信念，逃离初始信念构成的凸包——这是经典共识模型所不允许的行为。所有模型家族中锚点的影响强度大致相当，但锚点的位置差异显著。只有当锚点远离初始意见时，讨论才会逃离凸包，此时必须使用完整的闭环模型才能准确描述讨论过程。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM讨论中锚点驱动的行为是一个谱系而非二元现象；恢复的锚点能否泛化到未见数据可作为判断模型是否真正受锚点驱动的简单测试方法；该工作为理解和改进多智能体LLM讨论提供了理论基础。

title: NRITYAM: Language Models Meet Art and Heritage of Dance
summary: Language models have become essential tools in shaping modern workflows. However, their global effectiveness hinges on a nuanced understanding of local socio-cultural contexts. To address this gap, we present NRITYAM, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating the cultural comprehension capabilities of language models in the context of global dance traditions. NRITYAM comprises 9,260 carefully curated question-answer pairs spanning 12 languages, making it the largest dataset dedicated to evaluating cultural knowledge in dance. The dataset has been developed from the ground up through close collaboration with native dance artists and native speakers of the languages, who authored and validated culturally relevant questions specific to their regions. We evaluate a broad set of models, including large language models, small language models, multimodal large language models, and small multimodal language models. As a multilingual and multicultural benchmark, NRITYAM sets a new standard for evaluating the ability of AI systems to understand and reason about traditional performing arts. Detailed dataset samples are available at~\url{https://github.com/niladrighosh03/NRITYAM}.

AI.tldr: NRITYAM 是一个包含 9,260 个问答对、覆盖 12 种语言、专为评估语言模型对全球舞蹈传统中文化理解能力而设计的大型基准数据集，由本土舞蹈艺术家和母语者共同构建，为评估 AI 系统对传统表演艺术的理解和推理能力设立了新标准。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在全球范围内的有效性依赖于对当地社会文化语境的细致理解，但当前缺乏专门评估模型在舞蹈传统领域文化理解能力的基准，这一研究空白限制了 AI 系统在多元文化场景下的可靠应用。
AI.method: NRITYAM 通过与本土地舞艺术家和母语者紧密合作，从头构建了包含 9,260 个精心策划的问答对的数据集，覆盖 12 种语言，并基于此基准系统评估了包括大型语言模型、小型语言模型、多模态大语言模型以及小型多模态语言模型在内的广泛模型类别。
AI.result: NRITYAM 是目前规模最大的用于评估舞蹈文化知识的专用数据集，涵盖多语言和多文化场景，并通过对多种模型架构（从大语言模型到多模态模型）的系统评估，验证了该基准作为评估 AI 系统对传统表演艺术理解能力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NRITYAM 作为一个多语言、多文化的基准测试，为评估 AI 系统理解和推理传统表演艺术的能力设立了新标准，强调了在评估语言模型全球有效性时必须纳入本地社会文化语境这一关键维度。

title: Mix-QVLA: Task-Evidence-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization of Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: We propose Mix-QVLA, a task-evidence-aware mixed-precision PTQ framework for VLA models. Mix-QVLA anchors each quantized variant to the full-precision action-token reference decision and evaluates whether quantization preserves task-relevant evidence across key VLA functional boundaries. It computes normalized gradient-weighted task-evidence maps from boundary activations and compares full-precision and quantized maps using evidence-mass and attribution-distribution distortion, capturing changes in both the strength and allocation of decision-supporting evidence. A soft-bottleneck objective aggregates boundary-level degradation into layer-wise sensitivity scores. Mix-QVLA further models sensitivity throughout task execution, capturing phase-dependent shifts in layer importance rather than assuming a fixed sensitivity profile. The resulting evidence- and time-aware scores guide mixed-precision bit allocation under model-size and BitOps budgets. Extensive evaluations on OpenVLA-style policies show that Mix-QVLA improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off of low-bit VLA deployment. On LIBERO, Mix-QVLA reduces OpenVLA-OFT memory from 15.4 GB to 4.1 GB, retains 96.3 average success compared with 97.1 for the BF16 model, and achieves a 1.52x inference speedup.

AI.tldr: Mix-QVLA提出了一种面向VLA模型的任务证据感知混合精度PTQ框架，通过计算全精度与量化版本间的梯度加权任务证据图失真来衡量量化对决策依据的破坏程度，并引入时间感知的敏感度建模指导混合精度比特分配，在LIBERO上将OpenVLA-OFT从15.4 GB压缩至4.1 GB，成功率仅下降0.8%并获得1.52倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型的PTQ方法主要关注激活或权重统计量的保持，忽视了量化操作对模型决策所依赖的任务相关证据的破坏，且缺乏对任务执行过程中层重要性动态变化（即阶段依赖的敏感度漂移）的建模，导致低比特部署下准确性与效率的权衡不佳。
AI.method: Mix-QVLA以全精度动作令牌参考决策为锚点，在VLA关键功能边界上从边界激活计算归一化梯度加权任务证据图，通过证据质量和归因分布失真量量化全精度与量化图之间的差异；进一步通过软瓶颈目标将边界级退化聚合为层级敏感度分数，并对任务执行全过程进行时间感知的敏感度建模，最终在模型大小和BitOps预算约束下指导混合精度比特分配。
AI.result: 在OpenVLA风格策略上的大量实验表明，Mix-QVLA显著提升了低比特VLA部署的精度-效率权衡。在LIBERO基准上，该方法将OpenVLA-OFT的GPU内存占用从15.4 GB降至4.1 GB，平均成功率（96.3%）与BF16基线（97.1%）基本持平，同时实现了1.52倍的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: Mix-QVLA通过任务证据感知与时间敏感的敏感度建模，为VLA模型的高效低比特部署提供了新的思路，揭示了量化过程中保留决策相关证据的重要性以及层重要性随执行阶段动态变化的特性，未来可进一步推广至更广泛的视觉-语言-行动模型架构。

title: DeXposure-Claw: An Agentic System for DeFi Risk Supervision
summary: Decentralized finance exposes supervisors to fast-moving, networked credit risks. General-purpose LLM agents fit this setting poorly: they over-read weak evidence and recommend high-stakes interventions, while existing evaluations offer no regulator-aligned way to measure the resulting false alarms. We introduce DeXposure-Claw, a forecast-grounded agentic supervision system that routes LLM decisions through structured evidence: (1) DeXposure-FM, a graph time-series foundation model, forecasts future exposure networks; (2) deterministic monitors and stress scenarios then turn those forecasts into typed alerts, attribution signals, and scenario evidence; and (3) data-health and confidence gates constrain escalation before DeXposure-Claw emits auditable supervisory tickets with rationales. We further develop DeXposure-Bench, a six-axis evaluation harness, whose decision axis scores tickets against a regulator-aligned absolute-loss ground truth and an explicit false-intervention rate. Experiments on five years of weekly real data fully support our system. Code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/DeXposure-Claw.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DeXposure-Claw，一个基于预测引导的智能监管系统，结合图时序基础模型、确定性监控器与置信门控机制，用于去中心化金融中的信用风险监管；同时构建 DeXposure-Bench 六轴评估框架，以监管对齐的绝对损失与虚假干预率为决策指标，实验验证了系统的有效性。
AI.motivation: 去中心化金融中的信用风险具有快速传播的网络化特征，现有通用LLM智能体对此场景适应性差：它们过度解读弱证据并推荐高风险干预措施，而现有评估方法缺乏监管对齐的指标来量化由此产生的虚假警报。
AI.method: DeXposure-Claw 系统包含三个核心模块：(1) DeXposure-FM，一个图时序基础模型，用于预测未来的风险暴露网络；(2) 确定性监控器与压力场景模块，将预测转化为类型化警报、归因信号和场景证据；(3) 数据健康与置信门控机制，在 DeXposure-Claw 输出带有推理过程的可审计监管工单前约束告警升级。同时构建 DeXposure-Bench 六轴评估框架，其决策轴使用监管对齐的绝对损失基准和明确的虚假干预率来评分工单质量。
AI.result: 在五年周级真实数据上的实验全面支持了所提系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的结构化的证据路由机制与监管对齐的评估框架，为LLM在去中心化金融监管中的可信应用提供了可行方案，代码已开源。

title: Beyond Uniform Forgetting: A Study of Sequential Direct Preference Optimization Across Preference Settings
summary: Aligning language models with human preferences often requires optimising multiple behavioural objectives. A practical approach is to apply these objectives sequentially using preference optimisation methods such as Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO), but it remains unclear whether later training uniformly degrades preferences learned earlier or whether the effect depends on the relationship between objectives. We study sequential DPO across four preference settings covering distributional conflict, multi-attribute interaction, strong safety signal, and compatible response-quality objectives. Using Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct with LoRA adapters, we evaluate all objectives after every stage with a fixed base-model reference. We find that sequential DPO does not produce a single forgetting pattern; preference change ranges from partial degradation to stability, pair-level redistribution, or positive transfer depending on objective relationship, signal strength, and training order. Pair-level analysis using length-normalised policy margins shows that aggregate metrics can mask heterogeneous changes across preference pairs, whereas quartile decomposition reveals that high-confidence pairs can either degrade or improve depending on the setting. Mechanistic diagnostics show that Stage~2 gradients and adapter updates are near-orthogonal to the previous objective across all settings, providing little evidence that direct gradient opposition is the primary driver. These findings suggest that future sequential alignment pipelines should account for objective compatibility and signal strength, rather than assuming that later objectives affect earlier preferences uniformly.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统探究了序列化直接偏好优化（Sequential DPO）对语言模型多偏好目标的影响，发现遗忘模式并非单一，而是取决于目标关系、信号强度和训练顺序，并且聚合指标可能掩盖样本层面的异质性变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常通过偏好优化方法（如DPO）顺序地对语言模型施加多个行为目标，但尚未明确后续训练是否会均匀地破坏先前已习得的偏好，还是其影响取决于目标之间的关系。该研究旨在填补这一空白，系统分析序列DPO中偏好遗忘的具体模式及其驱动因素。
AI.method: 以Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct为基座模型，搭配LoRA适配器，在覆盖分布冲突、多属性交互、强安全信号和兼容响应质量目标四种偏好设置的场景下，依次执行DPO训练，并在每个阶段使用固定的基座模型参考评估所有目标。采用长度归一化策略边界进行样本对级别的分析，并通过四分位分解和梯度正交性诊断等机制性工具揭示偏好变化的底层规律。
AI.result: 实验表明序列DPO不产生单一的遗忘模式，偏好变化涵盖部分退化、稳定性、样本对级重分配乃至正向迁移等多种情形。聚合指标掩盖了偏好样本对之间的异质性变化，而四分位分解显示高置信度样本对在不同设置下可能退化或提升。机制诊断发现第二阶段梯度与适配器更新与前一目标近似正交，表明直接梯度对抗并非主要驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现提示未来的序列对齐流程应考虑目标兼容性和信号强度，而非假定后续目标会均匀地影响先前偏好。该工作为多目标顺序偏好优化的理解和实践提供了重要指导。

title: Language-Instructed Vision Embeddings for Controllable and Generalizable Perception
summary: Vision foundation models are typically trained as static feature extractors, placing the burden of task adaptation onto large downstream models. We propose an alternative paradigm: instead of solely feeding visual features into language models, we use language itself to dynamically guide the vision encoder. Our method, Language-Instructed Vision Embeddings (LIVE), leverages language as high-level guidance to produce task-centric embeddings at inference time, removing the need for task-specific retraining. This enables the encoder to focus on contextually relevant aspects of the input, yielding more controllable and generalizable representations. Empirically, LIVE reduces visual hallucinations (+34 points on MMVP), surpasses vision-language models with orders of magnitude more parameters on visual question answering, and generalizes to unseen instructions and tasks -- offering a direct path toward adaptive, instruction-driven visual intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出Language-Instructed Vision Embeddings (LIVE)方法，利用语言作为高层指导动态引导视觉编码器生成任务中心嵌入，无需特定任务重训练即可实现自适应视觉表示，实验表明在减少幻觉和视觉问答上显著超越更大规模模型。
AI.motivation: 视觉基础模型通常被训练为静态特征提取器，将任务自适应的负担转移到大型下游模型上，缺乏一种能够根据任务需求动态调整视觉表示的机制，导致需要大量任务特定重训练或微调。
AI.method: LIVE方法利用语言本身作为高层指导信号，在推理时动态引导视觉编码器的特征提取过程，生成任务中心的嵌入表示。与将视觉特征直接输入语言模型的传统范式不同，LIVE通过语言指令驱动视觉编码器聚焦于输入中上下文相关的方面，从而产生更加可控和泛化的表示，无需任务特定的重训练。
AI.result: 在MMVP基准上将视觉幻觉减少34个百分点；在视觉问答任务上超越参数数量高出数个量级的视觉-语言模型；能够泛化到未见过的指令和任务。
AI.conclusion: LIVE范式通过语言引导视觉编码器实现了自适应的指令驱动视觉智能，为构建无需任务特定重训练、泛化能力更强的视觉表示提供了直接路径，在幻觉减少和跨任务泛化方面展现了显著优势。

title: REVEAL++: Differentiable Phenotypic Grouping for Vision-Language Retinal Modeling of Alzheimer's Disease Risk
summary: The retina offers a noninvasive window into neurodegenerative disease, capturing subtle structural patterns associated with a risk of future cognitive decline. Vision-language alignment frameworks such as REVEAL have shown that pairing retinal fundus images with structured clinical risk narratives improves early prediction of Alzheimer's disease (AD). A key design choice in these approaches is the use of phenotypic grouping, where individuals with similar risk profiles are treated as multi-positive pairs during contrastive learning. However, existing methods operationalize phenotypic similarity as a discrete construct, relying on hard group assignments that impose rigid supervision and decouple group formation from representation learning. We propose a continuous formulation of phenotypic structure within contrastive learning. Rather than assigning samples to fixed clusters, we model inter-subject similarity as a differentiable weighting function derived from intra-modality embedding similarities in both retinal images and risk profiles. These weights define soft multi-positive relationships through a continuous aggregation operator, enabling graded supervision that reflects the spectrum nature of disease risk. We further introduce a soft-target contrastive objective that jointly learns cross-modal alignment and phenotypic structure in an end-to-end manner. Evaluated on UK Biobank retinal imaging data for incident AD prediction, the proposed framework consistently outperforms discrete group-based contrastive learning and standard vision-language baselines. By treating phenotypic similarity as a learnable, continuous signal rather than a fixed grouping rule, our approach provides a principled and robust foundation for population-scale neurodegenerative risk modeling from multi-modal retinal and clinical data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种连续的、可学习的表型相似性建模方法（软多正例对比学习），替代传统离散分组对比学习，在视网膜图像与临床风险文本的跨模态对齐中实现了更优的阿尔茨海默病早期预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言对齐框架（如REVEAL）虽通过表型分组（将相似风险个体作为多正例对）提升了阿尔茨海默病早期预测效果，但传统方法将表型相似性视为离散构念，依赖硬分组标签，将分组过程与表示学习解耦，无法捕捉疾病风险的连续谱系特性。
AI.method: 提出一种连续形式的表型结构对比学习方法：利用视网膜图像和临床风险文本各自模态内的嵌入相似度构建可微分的加权函数，将个体间相似性建模为连续权重，通过连续聚合算子定义软多正例关系，并引入软目标对比损失函数实现跨模态对齐与表型结构的端到端联合学习。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank视网膜影像数据上针对阿尔茨海默病发病预测任务进行评估，所提出的框架在性能上一致优于基于离散分组的对比学习方法以及标准视觉-语言基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 将表型相似性视为可学习的连续信号而非固定分组规则，为基于多模态视网膜与临床数据的大规模神经退行性疾病风险建模提供了原则性且稳健的基础。

title: AtomMem: Building Simple and Effective Memory System for LLM Agents via Atomic Facts
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong reasoning and generation abilities, but their fixed context windows limit long-term information accumulation and reuse across multi-session interactions. Existing memory-augmented systems often construct memory in a coarse and unstable manner, relying on inefficient memory representations or unstable unconstrained updates. To address these challenges, we propose AtomMem, a long-term memory system designed for value-dense storage and stable memory evolution. AtomMem introduces a Fact Executor, which selectively extracts high value atomic facts from long form interactions to serve as highly efficient memory representations. Subsequently, AtomMem organizes these facts into hierarchical event structures and temporal profiles, capturing coherent episodic contexts and tracking dynamically evolving user attributes over time. During retrieval, the system activates an associative memory graph to connect fragmented memories. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark confirm that AtomMem achieves state-of-the-art performance across various reasoning tasks, offering a scalable and economically viable solution for deploying intelligent personalized agents.

AI.tldr: AtomMem 提出了一种面向大语言模型的值密度存储与稳定演化长期记忆系统，通过事实执行器提取高价值原子事实、构造层次化事件结构与时间剖面，并利用关联记忆图实现碎片化记忆连接，在 LoCoMo 基准上取得多类推理任务的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型具备强大的推理与生成能力，但其固定上下文窗口限制了跨多轮会话交互中长时信息的累积与复用；现有记忆增强系统往往采用粗粒度且不稳定的记忆构建方式，依赖低效的记忆表示或不可控的无约束更新，亟需一种值密度高、演化稳定的长期记忆机制。
AI.method: AtomMem 包含三个核心组件：一是事实执行器（Fact Executor），从长程交互中有选择地提取高价值原子事实作为高效记忆表示；二是层次化事件结构与时间剖面，用于组织这些事实以捕获连贯的情节语境并追踪动态演化的用户属性；三是检索阶段激活的关联记忆图（associative memory graph），用于连接碎片化的记忆以实现有效召回。
AI.result: 在 LoCoMo 基准上的实验结果表明，AtomMem 在多种推理任务上均取得了当前最优（state-of-the-art）性能，验证了该系统在记忆密度、存储效率及推理能力方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: AtomMem 提供了一种可扩展且经济可行的长期记忆解决方案，能够为智能个性化代理部署提供支撑，其价值在于通过高密度存储与稳定演化机制克服了传统记忆系统的粗粒度与不稳定性缺陷。

title: Vortex: Multi-Modal Fusion System for Intelligent Video Retrieval
summary: This paper presents Vortex, the multimodal video retrieval system developed by our team, FocusOnFun, for the Ho Chi Minh City AI Challenge 2025, designed to advance intelligent multimedia search and temporal reasoning. The system integrates adaptive keyframe extraction, multimodal metadata generation from vision-language and speech models, and a hybrid retrieval strategy that fuses CLIP and SigLIP2 embeddings through Reciprocal Rank Fusion to balance global and fine-grained semantics. To enhance interactivity, Vortex incorporates Rocchio-based relevance feedback and a multi-stage temporal search mechanism for sequential event alignment. Built on Milvus and Elasticsearch, the architecture enables scalable indexing and efficient retrieval. Evaluated in the official competition, our FocusOnFun team's system achieved a score of 79.6/88 (90.5\%) in the Preliminary Round and was further evaluated in the Final Round, achieving an `Excellent' overall performance with `Outstanding' results in the question-answering (QA) task. This demonstrating the complementary strengths of CLIP and SigLIP2 and confirming the effectiveness of the hybrid retrieval approach. The system establishes a robust foundation for future research in intelligent, context-aware, and interactive video retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Vortex，一个集成自适应关键帧提取、多模态元数据生成、混合检索策略（CLIP与SigLIP2通过互惠排名融合）以及Rocchio相关反馈的多模态视频检索系统，在Ho Chi Minh City AI Challenge 2025中取得了90.5%的初赛得分和决赛"优秀"评级，验证了混合检索方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检索系统在兼顾全局语义与细粒度语义方面存在不足，且缺乏交互式反馈机制和高效的时序对齐能力，难以满足智能多媒体搜索与时序推理任务的复杂需求。
AI.method: Vortex系统集成了自适应关键帧提取、基于视觉-语言模型和语音模型的多模态元数据生成，以及通过互惠排名融合（Reciprocal Rank Fusion）融合CLIP和SigLIP2嵌入的混合检索策略；同时采用Rocchio相关反馈增强交互性，并设计了多阶段时序搜索机制用于序列事件对齐；系统基于Milvus和Elasticsearch构建以实现可扩展索引和高效检索。
AI.result: 该系统在Ho Chi Minh City AI Challenge 2025官方评测中，初赛轮取得79.6/88分（90.5%）的成绩，决赛轮获得整体"优秀"评级，并在问答（QA）任务中获得"杰出"评级，验证了CLIP与SigLIP2的互补优势以及混合检索方法的效果。
AI.conclusion: Vortex系统证实了混合检索策略在视频检索中的有效性，CLIP与SigLIP2的互补使用能够平衡全局与细粒度语义，为未来智能、上下文感知和交互式视频检索研究奠定了坚实基础。

title: Uncertainty Decomposition for Clarification Seeking in LLM Agents
summary: Recent position papers argue that the classical aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty framework is insufficient for interactive large language model (LLM) agents and call for underspecification-aware, decomposed, and communicable uncertainty representations that can unlock new agent capabilities such as proactive clarification seeking and shared mental-model building. Practical deployment constraints -- black-box APIs, interactive latency budgets, and the absence of labeled trajectories -- rule out logprob-based, multi-sampling, and training-based methods, leaving prompt-based estimation as the most viable family for surfacing such signals at deployment time. We answer this call with a simple prompt-based decomposition that separates action confidence from request uncertainty (u), enabling the agent to ask for clarification when the task specification is ambiguous. To evaluate it, we introduce two clarification-augmented benchmarks (WebShop-Clarification and ALFWorld-Clarification) in which 50% of tasks are deliberately underspecified, and systematically compare the proposed decomposition against ReAct+UE and Uncertainty-Aware Memory (UAM) across five LLM backbones (GPT-5.1, DeepSeek-v3.2-exp, GLM-4.7, Qwen3.5-35B, GPT-OSS-120B) on these variants together with the standard WebShop, ALFWorld, and REAL benchmarks for fault detection. Averaged across the five backbones, the proposed decomposition improves clarification F1 on ALFWorld-Clarification by 73% over ReAct+UE and by 36% over UAM, and leads clarification F1 on every backbone on WebShop-Clarification and on four of five backbones on ALFWorld-Clarification, indicating that the gains generalize beyond a single LLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示（prompt-based）的不确定性分解方法，将动作置信度与请求不确定性分离，使LLM智能体能在任务规格不明确时主动寻求澄清，并在两个新引入的澄清增强基准上相比基线方法取得了显著的F1提升。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明经典的偶然/认知不确定性框架不足以支持交互式LLM智能体，实际部署中的黑盒API、低延迟预算和缺乏标注轨迹等约束排除了基于logprob、多采样和训练的方法，因此需要一种轻量级、可分解且可通信的不确定性表示方法以实现主动澄清和共享心智模型构建。
AI.method: 提出一个简单的基于提示的不确定性分解方法，将智能体的动作置信度（action confidence）与请求不确定性（request uncertainty, u）分离，当任务规格存在歧义时触发澄清行为；同时构建了两个澄清增强基准WebShop-Clarification和ALFWorld-Clarification，其中50%的任务被故意设计为欠规格（underspecified）状态。
AI.result: 在五个LLM骨干（GPT-5.1, DeepSeek-v3.2-exp, GLM-4.7, Qwen3.5-35B, GPT-OSS-120B）上平均，所提方法在ALFWorld-Clarification上的澄清F1相比ReAct+UE提升73%，相比UAM提升36%；在WebShop-Clarification上在所有骨干上领先，在ALFWorld-Clarification上在五个骨干中的四个上领先，表明增益在多个模型上具有泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 基于提示的不确定性分解方法能够有效弥补现有不确定性框架在交互式LLM智能体中的不足，通过分离动作置信度与请求不确定性实现主动澄清，且性能提升在不同LLM骨干上具有良好的泛化能力，为实际部署中的不确定性感知智能体提供了可行方案。

title: Large Language Models Do Not Always Need Readable Language
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are commonly prompted and interfaced with human-readable natural language, even when the intended reader is another model. This paper investigates whether semantic information can be encoded in compact, non-standard textual forms that sacrifice human readability while remaining recoverable by LLMs. We refer to this class of model-centric textual representations as BabelTele, approached here not as a fixed protocol but as an empirical probe into LLMs' capacity to generate and interpret such representations. Through readability diagnostics, model likelihood measures, human questionnaires, and downstream task evaluations, we find that BabelTele can substantially depart from ordinary natural language while preserving core semantics for instruction-tuned LLMs. As a task-agnostic representational paradigm, BabelTele demonstrates high information density, maintaining 99.5% semantic fidelity even when the text volume is condensed to 27.9% of its original length. We further evaluate its semantic robustness in cross-model transfer, agent memory, and multi-agent communication. Results suggest that BabelTele can reduce context overhead while generally maintaining reliable downstream performance, although its effectiveness depends on the compressor-reader pair and task setting. These findings indicate that human readability, natural-language typicality, and model-side semantic recoverability can be partially decoupled, opening a path toward model-native representations in future exploration of LLM systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了一种名为BabelTele的模型中心化文本表示范式，该范式通过牺牲人类可读性来压缩语义信息，实验表明它能在将文本压缩至原始长度27.9%的同时保持99.5%的语义 fidelity，并支持跨模型迁移、智能体记忆和多智能体通信等任务，揭示了人类可读性、自然语言典型性与模型侧语义可恢复性可部分解耦的结论。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型（LLM）通常使用人类可读的自然语言进行交互，即使交互对象是另一个模型，这种方式在信息密度和通信效率上存在冗余；本文旨在探究能否将语义信息编码为紧凑的、非标准文本形式，在牺牲人类可读性的同时仍能被LLM可靠地恢复和理解。
AI.method: 本文提出BabelTele这一模型中心化文本表示范式，将其作为经验性探针而非固定协议，通过可读性诊断、模型似然度量、人类问卷和下游任务评估等多个维度，系统考察了指令微调后的LLM生成和解释这类非标准文本表示的能力，并在跨模型迁移、智能体记忆和多智能体通信等场景中评估其语义鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，BabelTele可以将文本压缩至原始长度的27.9%，同时保持99.5%的语义 fidelity；其效果依赖于压缩器-解读器的配对以及具体任务设置；在跨模型迁移、智能体记忆和多智能体通信等任务中，BabelTele在减少上下文开销的同时整体上保持可靠的下游性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，人类可读性、自然语言典型性与模型侧语义可恢复性可以部分解耦，这为未来LLM系统中采用模型原生表示开辟了新的路径；BabelTele作为一种任务无关的表示范式，有望在大幅降低通信成本的同时保证语义保真度。

title: Exploring Multi-Modal Large Language Models and Two-Stage Fine-Tuning for Fashion Image Retrieval
summary: Composed image retrieval retrieves a target image using a composed query of a reference image and a modified text description. In the fashion domain, this task requires understanding subtle attribute variations such as color, pattern, and texture. However, existing approaches face limitations due to scarce annotated data and simplistic negative sampling. We propose a novel framework that integrates a multi-modal large language model (LLaVA) to generate attribute-aware triplets and introduces a two-stage fine-tuning strategy to enhance contrastive learning. We leverage pretrained vision-language models, such as CLIP-ViT/B32, to generate and concatenate sentence-level prompts with the relative caption and to scale the number of negatives using static representations. Experimental results demonstrate enhanced compositional reasoning and improved fine-grained retrieval behavior, underscoring the feasibility and potential of the proposed framework for fashion retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个融合多模态大语言模型LLaVA的框架，用于生成属性感知三元组，并引入两阶段微调策略增强对比学习，以解决时尚领域组合图像检索中标注数据稀缺和负采样简单的问题，实验验证了该方法在细粒度检索和组合推理上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有组合图像检索方法在时尚领域面临两个主要限制：一是标注数据稀缺，难以覆盖丰富的属性变化（如颜色、图案、纹理）；二是负采样策略过于简单，导致模型难以学习到细粒度的属性判别能力，制约了组合推理性能。
AI.method: 提出一个融合LLaVA多模态大语言模型的框架，用于自动生成属性感知的（参考图像、文本描述、目标图像）三元组；同时引入两阶段微调策略以增强对比学习效果。具体地，利用预训练视觉语言模型（如CLIP-ViT/B32）生成并拼接句级提示与相对描述文本，并利用静态表示扩展负样本数量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在组合推理和细粒度检索行为上均有显著提升，验证了生成属性感知三元组和两阶段微调策略对于改善时尚领域组合图像检索的有效性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，利用多模态大语言模型生成更具多样性和属性敏感性的训练数据，结合两阶段微调与增强负采样，能够有效克服时尚检索中数据稀疏和负样本质量低下的问题，为组合图像检索提供了可行的新范式。

title: Analyzing the Narration Gap in LLM-Solver Loops
summary: Formal tools such as SAT and SMT solvers are increasingly embedded in language model reasoning pipelines when a safety or security critical question can be formulated in logic. Unlike chain of thought whose steps are sampled from the model distribution without formal guarantee, a solver produces a sound and independently verifiable answer. However, the soundness guarantee can be lost in the interaction between the solver and the model. The hybrid pipeline has three components: formalizing the question, deciding it, and narrating the result. Prior work has studied the formalization and decision, but not narration, which is the step that turns a formal tool's output into the user answer. To fill the narration gap, we first model the LLM-solver loop as a verified decision procedure. We further evaluate five open-sourced models under prompt injection, and we find certificate gating makes the solver verdict sound, while an adversary can invert a verified conclusion across phrasings and channels. We study the mitigation through hardened prompt that reduces injection significantly but cannot eliminate it and still suffers under adaptive attack. Combining the formal analysis and empirical studies, we show in the LLM-solver loop, robustness does not reach to the answer that the user finally reads.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在LLM-SMT/SAT求解器混合推理管线中，虽然求解器本身提供形式化保证，但将求解器输出转化为用户可读答案的"叙述"环节会破坏这种可靠性；通过形式化建模和实证研究，发现证书门控可保证求解器结果正确，但对抗性提示注入可颠倒已验证的结论，且硬化提示无法完全消除该漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注了LLM与形式化求解器（SAT/SMT）混合管线中的问题形式化和求解决策步骤，但忽略了"叙述"环节——即将求解器输出转化为用户最终答案的过程；这一环节可能丢失求解器提供的可靠性保证，形成研究空白。
AI.method: 首先将LLM-求解器交互循环建模为可验证的决策过程，定义并区分了形式化、决策和叙述三个组件；然后对五个开源模型进行提示注入攻击实验，评估证书门控对求解器结论的保护效果，并测试硬化提示对注入攻击的缓解作用及在自适应攻击下的表现。
AI.result: 证书门控可确保求解器判决结果的可靠性，但对抗性攻击者可通过不同措辞和通道（phrasings and channels）颠倒已验证的结论；硬化提示能显著降低注入攻击成功率但无法完全消除，且在自适应攻击下仍然失效；这表明在LLM-求解器循环中，鲁棒性无法传递到用户最终阅读的答案。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现混合推理管线的脆弱性不在于求解器本身，而在于将形式化输出叙述为自然语言答案的环节；即使形式化决策是可靠的，对抗性攻击仍可在叙述阶段破坏最终答案的正确性，提示当前LLM-求解器集成方案在安全关键场景中存在根本性风险。

title: IHUBERT: Vector-Based Semantic Deduplication and Domain-Balanced Pretraining for Persian Resources
summary: Persian pretrained language models (PLMs) are still limited by the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality pretraining corpora and by insufficient evaluation beyond standard classification and NER tasks. We present IHUBERT, a monolingual Persian PLM trained from scratch with the RoBERTa-base encoder (125M parameters) on a 45 GB curated subset of the Sepahr-Danesh collection (about 7-8B tokens). To improve corpus quality and reduce redundancy, we employ a multi-stage preprocessing pipeline that includes normalization, exact and near-duplicate removal, anonymization, and vector-database-based semantic deduplication for distribution balancing control across domains and registers. We additionally train a 139k-vocabulary BPE tokenizer on the full pretraining corpus to better capture Persian morphology and orthographic variation. IHUBERT is evaluated on seven Persian NLU benchmarks covering NER, sentiment analysis, topic classification, NLI, extractive question answering, and relation extraction, using task-standard metrics (entity-level F1, Macro-F1, EM/F1). IHUBERT achieves its strongest gains on extractive QA, ranking first on both PQuAD (F1 88.3542) and ParsiNLU-RC (F1 49.0987), and attains the best result on FarsTail (Macro-F1 0.8350). On NER and topic classification, it remains competitive (e.g., 0.8308 F1 on ParsTwiNER; 0.7953 Macro-F1 on DigiMag), while relation extraction remains the main remaining gap (0.6684 Macro-F1 on PERLEX). A controlled tokenizer ablation on the IHUBERT pretraining corpus shows that BPE yields slightly lower subword fragmentation than WordPiece at matched vocabulary size, supporting our tokenization design. Overall, IHUBERT advances Persian language modeling through semantically curated large-scale pretraining and broad evaluation across both classification and comprehension-oriented tasks.

AI.tldr: IHUBERT是一个从头训练的波斯语单语预训练语言模型（基于RoBERTa-base，125M参数），在45GB高质量Sepahr-Danesh语料库上训练，采用语义去重和BPE分词等策略，在7个波斯语NLU基准上表现优异，尤其在抽取式问答和自然语言推理任务上达到最优。
AI.motivation: 波斯语预训练语言模型仍受限于大规模高质量预训练语料库的稀缺性，且评估标准仅停留在分类和命名实体识别等基础任务上，缺乏对理解类任务的全面评估。
AI.method: 使用RoBERTa-base编码器架构（125M参数），在45GB（约70-80亿token）经过多阶段预处理的Sepahr-Danesh子集上从头训练；预处理流程包括归一化、精确与近似去重、匿名化以及基于向量数据库的语义去重以控制跨领域和语体的分布平衡；额外训练了一个139k词汇量的BPE分词器以更好地捕获波斯语形态和正字法变化。
AI.result: 在7个波斯语NLU基准上评估，涵盖NER、情感分析、主题分类、NLI、抽取式问答和关系抽取；在PQuAD（F1 88.3542）和ParsiNLU-RC（F1 49.0987）上取得抽取式问答最优，FarsTail上最佳（Macro-F1 0.8350），NER和主题分类上具有竞争力（ParsTwiNER F1 0.8308，DigiMag Macro-F1 0.7953），关系抽取仍为短板（PERLEX Macro-F1 0.6684）；分词消融实验表明在相同词汇量下BPE的子词碎片率略低于WordPiece。
AI.conclusion: IHUBERT通过语义化策展的大规模预训练和涵盖分类与理解任务的广泛评估，推进了波斯语语言建模；BPE分词器在波斯语上优于WordPiece，验证了分词设计选择的有效性；关系抽取仍是未来需要弥补的主要差距。

title: NEST: Narrative Event Structures in Time for Long Video Understanding
summary: Recent progress in vision-language models has enabled the processing of increasingly long video sequences, but the ability to handle extended token streams does not translate to understanding of narrative structure in long videos. Existing long video benchmarks focus on needle-in-a-haystack retrieval rather than evaluating how low-level actions form events, how events interact across time, and how narratives progress, for example, whether a model can connect an early setback, such as a job loss to a later relationship breakup, despite long gaps, intervening scenes, or flashbacks that reframe what occurred. We introduce NEST (Narrative Event Structures in Time for Long Video Understanding), a dataset of 1005 full-length movies (avg. 98 minutes), each annotated with 102 multimodal narrative events grounded in visual content, dialogue, and audio. NEST captures multimodal narrative events with structured annotations grounded in visual content, dialogue, and audio, and links them through relations that reflect narrative structure, including temporal ordering, hierarchical composition, and long-range dependencies. We introduce baselines for event trigger detection (ETD), event localization (EL), event argument extraction (EAE), and event relation extraction (ERE). The benchmark is highly challenging for grounded event discovery, with ETD below 8%, EL under 6%, and EAE below 11%. In contrast, ERE is more tractable once events are given, reaching 35.45% F1 zero-shot and 44.42% F1 after fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 NEST 数据集，包含 1005 部全长电影及多模态叙事事件注释，用于评估长视频叙事结构理解能力，实验表明现有模型在事件触发检测、定位和论元抽取任务上表现极低，但事件关系抽取在给定事件后相对可行。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频基准主要关注 needle-in-a-haystack 式检索，忽略了叙事结构理解，即模型能否将低层动作组合为事件、理解事件间跨时间交互以及叙事进展（如将早期失业与后期关系破裂联系起来），而现有长视频模型虽能处理扩展的 token 流，但并未具备真实的叙事结构理解能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了 NEST 数据集，包含 1005 部全长电影（平均 98 分钟），每部电影标注了 102 个多模态叙事事件，注释基于视觉内容、对话和音频，并通过时间顺序、层次组合和长程依赖等关系链接事件。在此基础上定义了事件触发检测（ETD）、事件定位（EL）、事件论元抽取（EAE）和事件关系抽取（ERE）四个基准任务。
AI.result: ETD 准确率低于 8%，EL 低于 6%，EAE 低于 11%，表明基于真实情境的事件发现极具挑战性；而 ERE 在给定事件后表现更可行，零样本 F1 达 35.45%，微调后达 44.42%。
AI.conclusion: NEST 揭示了当前长视频模型在叙事结构理解上的严重不足，尤其在底层事件发现任务上远未达到实用水平，而事件关系抽取相对更具可解性，为未来研究指明了方向：提升多模态事件发现能力是突破长视频叙事理解瓶颈的关键。

title: Denoising Implicit Feedback for Cold-start Recommendation
summary: Implicit feedback is widely used in recommender systems due to its accessibility and generality, yet it usually presents noisy samples (e.g., clickbait, position bias). Meanwhile, recommenders inevitably face the item cold-start problem due to the continuous influx of new items. We identify that cold items are more prone to noisy samples due to the aforementioned factors, and researchers often overlook the significance of denoising implicit feedback for cold items. Previous denoising studies usually identify noisy samples based on heuristic patterns, such as higher loss values, and mitigate noise through sample selection or re-weighting. However, these methods have limited adaptability and are ineffective in cold-start scenarios. To achieve denoising implicit feedback for cold-start recommendation, we propose a model-agnostic denoising method called DIF. First, user preferences for content remain stable, which allows us to infer pseudo-labels indicating whether a user is interested in a cold item through content-similar warm items. Furthermore, to improve pseudo-label accuracy, we model the confidence of pseudo-labels based on the content similarity between the cold item and warm items, and then aggregate multiple pseudo-labels for each sample. Finally, we explicitly estimate the uncertainty of the noisy sample label by considering its relative entropy and the cold-start status of the item, which adaptively guides the role of pseudo-labels to correct the noisy labels at the sample level. DIF's superiority is supported by both theoretical justification and extensive experiments on real-world datasets. The method has been deployed on a billion-user scale short video application Kuaishou and has significantly improved various commercial metrics within cold-start scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为DIF的模型无关去噪方法，通过内容相似的暖项为冷项生成伪标签，并利用不确定性和冷启动状态自适应纠正噪声标签，在冷启动推荐场景下显著提升推荐效果，已在快手短视频应用中部署并改善商业指标。
AI.motivation: 隐式反馈广泛用于推荐系统但存在噪声（如点击诱饵、位置偏差），而冷启动项目因缺乏交互数据更易受噪声影响；现有去噪方法多基于损失值等启发式模式，适应性有限，在冷启动场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出DIF方法，首先利用用户对内容偏好的稳定性，通过内容相似的暖项为冷项推断伪标签；然后基于冷项与暖项的内容相似度建模伪标签置信度，并聚合多个伪标签以提升准确性；最后通过样本相对熵和项目的冷启动状态显式估计噪声标签的不确定性，自适应地指导伪标签在样本级别纠正噪声标签。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的大量实验验证了DIF的有效性，并在十亿用户规模的快手短视频应用中部署，显著提升了冷启动场景下的各项商业指标。
AI.conclusion: DIF通过内容相似性驱动的伪标签生成和不确定性估计，实现了冷启动推荐中隐式反馈的有效去噪，理论分析和实验均证明了其优越性，为工业级冷启动推荐提供了一种实用的去噪范式。

title: When Does Streaming Tool Use Help? Characterizing Tool-Intent Stabilization in Streaming Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Streaming Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Streaming RAG) reduces user-perceived latency by issuing tool queries in parallel with ongoing user input, before the utterance is complete. Reported gains are aggregate, yet the mechanism's benefit is fundamentally query-intrinsic: speculation can only help when the correct tool query becomes determinable before the user stops speaking or typing. We isolate and measure this property -- tool-intent stabilization, the point in the input stream at which a speculative query's retrieval converges to the answer-bearing result. On the CRAG benchmark (1371 validation questions) we (i) measure the distribution of stabilization, (ii) derive a model-agnostic bound H on the portion of tool latency that can be hidden behind the user's remaining input, as a function of tool latency L and input cadence δ, (iii) validate against a working streaming pipeline that realized savings meet or exceed this bound, and (iv) identify which query properties predict early versus late stabilization. The study requires no model training and runs on commodity CPU hardware. We find that at a realistic operating point (L=600ms, δ=3w/s, θ=0.8), 73.9% of queries across the full benchmark admit substantial latency hiding -- a blended figure that mixes sufficiency stabilization on the 21.3% of questions where gold evidence is verbatim-present and BM25-retrievable (95.2% streamable on this favorable slice) with a grounding-free top-1-settling fallback on the remainder. On the favorable slice, φ_suf is bracketed to [0.26, 0.281] by exact and relaxed grounding -- both early. Question type produces a significant but coarse early/late split (Kruskal-Wallis p=0.017, epsilon^2=0.04), directly informing when a learned speculative trigger is worth its cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了工具意图稳定化（tool-intent stabilization）的概念，量化了流式检索增强生成（Streaming RAG）中投机查询的收益边界，发现73.9%的查询在合理操作点下可实现显著延迟隐藏，并揭示了查询类型对稳定化时机的粗粒度影响。
AI.motivation: 现有Streaming RAG研究报告的延迟收益是聚合统计的，但其收益本质上是查询内在的：投机查询只有在用户输入完成前工具查询变得可确定时才能发挥效用。现有研究缺乏对这一核心属性——工具意图稳定化（即投机查询的检索结果何时收敛到正确答案）的系统度量和理论分析。
AI.method: 在CRAG基准（1371个验证问题）上，本文（i）测量了工具意图稳定化的分布；（ii）推导了一个与模型无关的上界H，表示可隐藏在用户剩余输入背后的工具延迟比例，该上界是工具延迟L和输入节奏δ的函数；（iii）通过实际流式流水线验证了实际节省达到或超过该上界；（iv）识别了预测早期与晚期稳定化的查询属性。研究无需模型训练，在通用CPU硬件上运行。
AI.result: 在合理操作点（L=600ms, δ=3w/s, θ=0.8）下，73.9%的查询可实现显著延迟隐藏。其中21.3%的查询中黄金证据是逐字存在且可通过BM25检索的，该子集上95.2%可流式化，φ_suf被精确和宽松接地限定在[0.26, 0.281]的早期区间。查询类型导致显著但粗粒度的早期/晚期分裂（Kruskal-Wallis p=0.017, epsilon^2=0.04）。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Streaming RAG的性能收益建立了一个理论基础，揭示了工具意图稳定化的分布特性及其与查询属性的关系，表明大多数查询在用户完成输入前即可确定正确查询。研究结论直接指导了何时值得使用学习型投机触发机制，为流式RAG系统的实际部署提供了定量依据。

title: VFACamou: View-Fused Adversarial Camouflage for Environment-Adaptive Physical Evasion
summary: Adversarial camouflage in the physical world remains highly challenging, particularly under UAV reconnaissance where targets undergo continuous geometric changes and extreme illumination variations. Existing methods either optimize 2D digital perturbations that fail to generalize to dynamic viewpoints or produce visually unnatural textures that cannot be deployed in real scenarios. Therefore, we propose an end-to-end framework for adversarial camouflage generation that automatically produces wearable adversarial patterns and maintains stable attack performance in real physical environments with changing viewpoints, poses, and lighting conditions. Our method integrates UV-volume rendering with a diffusion-based texture generator, enabling consistent appearance under varying scales, poses, and lighting conditions. To ensure environmental realism, we propose an illumination color consistency estimator that extracts dominant background attributes and guides a natural texture loss to align the generated UV texture with the surrounding environment. A multi-scale dynamic training strategy further enhances robustness against viewpoint shifts and body deformation. Extensive experiments across multiple mainstream detectors demonstrate that our method achieves strong and stable physical attack performance while maintaining high perceptual naturalness, reducing human detection rates without introducing unnatural artifacts.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的物理世界对抗性伪装生成框架，结合UV-体渲染与扩散纹理生成器，在无人机侦察场景下实现跨视角、姿态和光照的稳定攻击性能，同时保持纹理的视觉自然性。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗伪装方法面临两大核心挑战：一是优化二维数字扰动无法泛化到动态视角变化；二是生成的纹理视觉不自然，无法在真实场景中部署。尤其在无人机侦察场景下，目标持续经历几何形变和极端光照变化，现有方法均难以兼顾攻击有效性与视觉真实性。
AI.method: 提出一个端到端对抗性伪装生成框架，核心组件包括：（1）UV-体渲染模块，实现跨尺度、姿态和光照条件下的一致性外观建模；（2）扩散纹理生成器，生成高自然度的可穿戴纹理图案；（3）光照颜色一致性估计器，提取背景主导属性并引导自然纹理损失，使生成的UV纹理与环境对齐；（4）多尺度动态训练策略，增强模型对视角偏移和身体形变的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个主流目标检测器上的大量实验表明，该方法在物理世界中实现了强且稳定的攻击性能，同时保持了高度的感知自然性；能够显著降低人类检测率，且不会引入不自然的伪影。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了数字对抗攻击与物理可部署伪装之间的差距，为真实场景下的视觉对抗提供了实用方案，尤其适用于对自然性和鲁棒性要求极高的无人机侦察对抗场景。

title: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
summary: Agent benchmarks are growing fast, but no single benchmark touches more than four or five of the dimensions that deployment exposes. This paper aggregates the largest coordinated deep-dive of one MCP-based industrial-agent benchmark to date: fourteen parallel implementation studies covering new asset classes (including a multi-modal visual extension), alternative orchestrations, retrieval strategies, reasoning modes, infrastructure optimizations, and evaluation-methodology probes. Consolidating those studies with seven prior agent benchmarks, we argue that aggregate-score leaderboards systematically underspecify deployed-agent evaluation. Rankings derived from aggregate scores do not transfer to out-of-distribution settings; recent public-to-hidden competition retrospectives provide direct empirical evidence of this rank instability. We propose ranking configurations by predictive validity, the correlation between in-sample and out-of-sample rank, rather than in-sample mean, and report a twelve-tier measurement apparatus that exposes the deployment-relevant dimensions HELM and its agent-era successors collapse. The position is operationalized through three falsifiable out-of-distribution criteria with explicit thresholds; existing evidence partly supports it but is too thin to confirm. We close with a pre-registered pilot design and a field-level vision for what the next generation of agentic benchmarks should report.

AI.tldr: 本文通过十四个并行实现研究对基于MCP的工业智能体基准进行了大规模深入分析，论证了聚合分数排行榜在评估部署级智能体时存在系统性的规范不足问题，并提出基于预测效度（样本内外排名相关性）的配置排序方法以及包含十二层测量指标的评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准虽然增长迅速，但没有任何单一基准能够覆盖部署环境所暴露的超过四到五个维度；聚合分数排行榜在智能体评估中存在系统性规范不足问题，排名结果无法迁移到分布外场景，且公共到隐藏排行榜的回顾性研究提供了排名不稳定性的直接经验证据。
AI.method: 本文聚合了十四个并行实现研究，涵盖新资产类别（包括多模态视觉扩展）、替代编排方式、检索策略、推理模式、基础设施优化以及评估方法学探针，并结合七个先前的智能体基准进行综合分析；提出基于预测效度（即样本内与样本外排名之间的相关性）而非样本内均值进行配置排序，并设计了一个十二层测量装置以暴露部署相关维度，同时提出了三个可证伪的分布外评估标准及显式阈值。
AI.result: 经验证据表明基于聚合分数的智能体基准排名在分布外设置中无法保持稳定性；现有证据部分支持所提出的分布外评估标准但尚不足以完全证实；文章提供了预注册实验设计作为验证基础。
AI.conclusion: 智能体基准评估应从聚合分数排行榜转向基于预测效度的多维评估体系，下一代智能体基准应当报告覆盖部署相关维度的十二层测量指标，并采用可证伪的分布外评估标准以提升评估的鲁棒性与可迁移性。

title: MedRLM: Recursive Multimodal Health Intelligence for Long-Context Clinical Reasoning, Sensor-Guided Screening, Evidence-Grounded Decision Support, and Community-to-Tertiary Referral Optimization
summary: Real-world clinical decision support requires reasoning over heterogeneous and longitudinal patient information rather than answering isolated medical questions. However, current medical large language models and retrieval-augmented generation systems often rely on single-step prompting or retrieval, which can be fragile when clinical evidence is distributed across long electronic health records, medical images, sensor streams, guidelines, and referral constraints. This paper proposes MedRLM, a Recursive Multimodal Health Intelligence framework for long-context clinical reasoning, sensor-guided screening, and community-to-tertiary referral support. Instead of compressing all patient information into one prompt, MedRLM treats the patient case as an external clinical environment that can be recursively inspected, decomposed, retrieved, verified, and synthesized. The framework coordinates specialized agents for clinical text, longitudinal EHR, medical imaging, physiological sensor signals, guideline retrieval, uncertainty auditing, and referral planning. It further introduces a Clinical Evidence Graph Memory to connect patient-specific observations with retrieved evidence, standardized definitions, sensor-derived biomarkers, and referral criteria. A sensor-guided recursive triggering mechanism activates deeper reasoning when abnormal physiological or behavioral patterns are detected, while uncertainty-gated refinement supports clinician review for high-risk or low-confidence cases. We also outline a real-data evaluation design using public and credentialed clinical datasets spanning EHR, radiology, ECG, ICU time series, and referral-proxy outcomes. MedRLM aims to move medical AI from static question answering toward auditable, multimodal, and workflow-aware clinical decision support.

AI.tldr: MedRLM提出一种递归多模态健康智能框架，通过将患者病例视为可递归检查的外部临床环境，协调多个专业智能体并引入临床证据图记忆与传感器引导的递归触发机制，将医疗AI从静态问答推向可审计、多模态且工作流感知的临床决策支持。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗大语言模型和检索增强生成系统通常依赖单步提示或检索，在临床证据分散于长期电子健康记录、医学影像、传感器流、指南和转诊约束等异构纵向信息中时表现脆弱，无法支持真实世界临床决策所需的推理能力。
AI.method: MedRLM将患者病例视为外部临床环境，通过递归检查、分解、检索、验证和合成来处理信息；框架协调多个专业智能体处理临床文本、纵向EHR、医学影像、生理传感器信号、指南检索、不确定性审计和转诊规划，并引入临床证据图记忆以连接患者特定观察与检索证据、标准化定义、传感器衍生生物标志物和转诊标准，同时采用传感器引导的递归触发机制在检测到异常时激活更深层推理，以及不确定性门控精化机制支持高风险或低置信度案例的临床审查。
AI.result: 论文概述了使用公共和经认证的临床数据集（涵盖EHR、放射学、ECG、ICU时间序列和转诊代理结果）进行真实数据评估的设计方案，但未报告具体的实验数值结果或基准性能指标，属于框架设计提案阶段。
AI.conclusion: MedRLM旨在推动医疗AI从静态问答向可审计、多模态且工作流感知的临床决策支持转变，其递归框架、证据图记忆和传感器触发机制为处理长期异构临床信息提供了系统化方案。

title: Occ-VLM: Occupancy Grounded Vision Language Model for Indoor Scene Understanding
summary: Recently, vision-language models (VLMs) have made significant progress in 3D scene understanding, driving advances in applications such as embodied intelligence and robotic vision. However, existing approaches typically either rely directly on explicit 3D inputs (e.g., point clouds or RGB-D sequences), or introduce an additional 3D geometry encoder to derive 3D-aware visual tokens from 2D images. Such designs structurally decouple 3D geometric perception from the rich 2D semantics learned via vision-language pre-training, hindering the development of a unified 3D vision-language representation. In this work, we propose Occ-VLM, a novel framework for 3D scene understanding that operates purely on posed RGB images and employs a single 2D vision encoder. Specifically, Occ-VLM reconstructs 3D scene occupancy as an auxiliary geometric prior, which is utilized to spatially associate foreground 2D tokens with 3D space. These tokens are then decoded by a Large Language Model (LLM) for unified scene understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Occ-VLM achieves both accurate geometric perception and robust vision-language reasoning: it attains state-of-the-art performance on multi-view occupancy prediction, while performing on par with 3D-input VLMs on 3D Visual Question Answering (VQA) and 3D dense captioning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Occ-VLM提出了一种仅依赖带位姿RGB图像的3D场景理解框架，通过重建3D场景占用作为几何先验，利用单一2D视觉编码器实现几何感知与视觉-语言推理的统一，在多视角占用预测上达到SOTA，并在3D VQA和密集字幕任务上与基于3D输入的VLM性能相当。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法要么直接依赖显式3D输入（如点云、RGB-D序列），要么引入额外的3D几何编码器从2D图像提取3D感知视觉token，这些设计在结构上解耦了3D几何感知与2D视觉-语言预训练中蕴含的丰富语义，阻碍了统一3D视觉-语言表示的构建。
AI.method: Occ-VLM仅以带位姿RGB图像为输入，使用单一2D视觉编码器。其核心思路是将3D场景占用重建作为辅助几何先验，利用该先验在3D空间中对前景2D token进行空间关联，随后将这些token送入大语言模型进行统一的场景理解解码。
AI.result: 实验表明Occ-VLM同时实现了精确的几何感知和鲁棒的视觉-语言推理：在多视角占用预测任务上达到最先进性能，在3D视觉问答和3D密集字幕基准测试上与使用3D输入的VLM性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过辅助占用重建作为几何先验，可以在不引入额外3D编码器、仅依赖2D视觉编码器的情况下实现统一的3D视觉-语言表示，为3D场景理解提供了一条避免3D几何与2D语义解耦的有效路径。

title: A Comparative Study of Pretrained Transformer Models for Quranic ASR: Speech Representations, Label Formats, and Dataset Composition
comment: 30 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables, Submitted to International Journal of Speech Technology
summary: Quran Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) aims to convert Quranic recitation into text, enabling applications such as aided memorisation tools and Quranic search engines. However, existing ASR models often exhibit high Word Error Rates (WER) on user-recited verses and lack full coverage of the Quranic corpus. This paper presents a systematic empirical study of domain-specific fine-tuning of pretrained Transformer-based models for Quranic ASR, using advanced speech feature extraction methods: Wav2Vec2.0, HuBERT, and XLS-R. These models apply self-supervised learning by masking portions of input audio and using Transformer architectures to learn context-aware speech features. The pretrained models are fine-tuned on a filtered Quranic dataset exceeding 870 hours of professional and user recitations. Through comprehensive ablation studies across feature extractors, output label formats, training strategies, and clip durations, we identify the key factors that affect transcription accuracy in this domain. Our best-performing configuration achieves a WER of 0.08 on the EveryAyah subset and 0.11 on the combined EveryAyah+Tarteel setting, representing roughly a five-percentage-point gain over the Citrinet baseline (WER = 0.163) while reducing combined-model training time from 140 hours to 40 hours. Arabic text without diacritics yields the best fine-tuning results, and Wav2Vec2-XLSR-53 provides the strongest overall representation. Future work includes improving dataset quality and developing phoneme-aware models to extract deeper speech feature representations for Tajweed-sensitive applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于Wav2Vec2.0、HuBERT和XLS-R等预训练Transformer模型的领域微调方法用于《古兰经》自动语音识别，在870小时专业和用户诵读数据集上，最优配置在EveryAyah子集上实现了0.08的词错误率（WER），相较于Citrinet基线（WER=0.163）提升了约五个百分点，同时将联合模型训练时间从140小时减少至40小时。
AI.motivation: 现有的《古兰经》自动语音识别（ASR）模型在用户诵读的经文上词错误率较高，且缺乏对完整《古兰经》语料库的覆盖，限制了其用于辅助记忆工具和古兰经搜索引擎等应用的效果。
AI.method: 本文采用领域微调的方法，对三种基于Transformer的预训练语音模型（Wav2Vec2.0、HuBERT和XLS-R）进行微调，这些模型通过自监督学习在输入音频中掩码部分片段来学习上下文感知的语音特征；微调使用了超过870小时的经过过滤的专业和用户诵读数据集，并系统开展了包括特征提取器、输出标签格式、训练策略和片段时长在内的消融研究。
AI.result: 最优配置在EveryAyah子集上达到0.08的WER，在EveryAyah+Tarteel联合设定上达到0.11的WER，相较Citrinet基线（WER=0.163）提升了约五个百分点，并将联合模型训练时间从140小时减少至40小时；研究还发现无变音符号的阿拉伯文本在微调中效果最佳，且Wav2Vec2-XLSR-53提供了最强的整体表示能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，对预训练Transformer语音模型进行领域微调能显著提升古兰经ASR性能，关键在于选择合适的预训练特征表示和输出标签格式；未来工作方向包括提升数据集质量和开发音素感知模型以提取更深入的语音特征表示，从而支持对泰吉威德规则敏感的应用。

title: ReNikud: Audio-Supervised Hebrew Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion
summary: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion for Modern Hebrew is needed for applications like text-to-speech (TTS), but is challenging due to the language's abjad writing system, which leaves vowels largely unwritten, creating substantial ambiguity. Standard approaches first predict vowel diacritics (nikud) to produce International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) transcriptions, but this is limited: vocalization data is scarce and laborious to produce, it does not specify features such as lexical stress, and it reflects formal grammatical rules rather than everyday spoken pronunciation. Direct sequence-to-sequence IPA prediction, meanwhile, struggles on limited data and fails to exploit the character-level alignment characteristic of abjads. Our method, ReNikud, overcomes these limitations with two key insights: (1) Weak audio supervision via a phoneme-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) pseudo-labeling pipeline on thousands of hours of unlabeled Hebrew audio, yielding phonemic transcriptions that reflect natural spoken norms without manual annotation. (2) A pseudo-vocalization architecture that predicts IPA phonemes at each character position, enforcing character-level alignment as an inductive bias. Results on existing Hebrew G2P benchmarks and the new targeted MILIM benchmark for spoken Hebrew show that ReNikud surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods. We will release our code and trained models to support further work on Hebrew TTS and speech technologies.

AI.tldr: 提出ReNikud方法，通过弱音频监督（ASR伪标签流水线）和伪标音架构（字符级对齐归纳偏置），在有限标注数据下实现现代希伯来语G2P转换，超越现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现代希伯来语的G2P转换面临独特挑战：其abjad书写系统元音缺失导致高度歧义，传统方法依赖稀缺且劳动密集的标音（nikud）数据，无法标注词汇重音，且反映的是正式语法规则而非日常口语发音；直接序列到序列IPA预测在有限数据下表现不佳且无法利用abjad的字符级对齐特性。
AI.method: ReNikud方法基于两个关键设计：(1) 弱音频监督——利用基于音素的ASR伪标签流水线在数千小时无标注希伯来语音频上生成反映自然口语规范的音素转录；(2) 伪标音架构——在每个字符位置预测IPA音素，强制施加字符级对齐作为归纳偏置，从而充分利用abjad书写系统的结构特性。
AI.result: 在现有希伯来语G2P基准和新增的针对口语希伯来语的MILIM基准上，ReNikud均超越了此前的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了通过弱监督音频和字符级对齐归纳偏置可以有效解决低资源abjad语言的G2P转换问题，生成的音素转录更贴近自然口语而非正式语法规则；代码和预训练模型将开源以支持希伯来语TTS及语音技术的后续研究。

title: Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Models
comment: Present at NeurIPS 2025 Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) enhance the interpretability of deep learning networks by aligning the features extracted from images with natural concepts. However, existing CBMs are constrained in their ability to generalize beyond a fixed set of predefined classes and the risk of non-concept information leakage, where predictive signals outside the intended concepts are inadvertently exploited. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Concept Bottleneck Model (MM-CBM) to address these issues and extend CBMs into CLIP. MM-CBM utilizes dual Concept Bottleneck Layers (CBLs) to align both the image and text embeddings into interpretable features. This allows us to perform new vision tasks like zero-shot classification or image retrieval in an interpretable way. Compared to existing methods, MM-CBM achieves up to 51.26% accuracy improvement on average across four standard benchmarks. Our method maintains high accuracy, staying within ~5% of black-box performance while offering greater interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出多模态概念瓶颈模型（MM-CBM），通过将CLIP中的图像和文本嵌入对齐到可解释的双重概念瓶颈层，实现可解释的零样本分类和图像检索，在四个基准上平均准确率提升高达51.26%，同时保持与黑盒模型约5%以内的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBM）受限于无法泛化到固定类别之外，且存在非概念信息泄露问题，即模型会无意中利用预期概念之外的预测信号，限制了可解释性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出多模态概念瓶颈模型（MM-CBM），将CBM扩展到CLIP框架中，利用双重概念瓶颈层（CBLs）分别对齐图像嵌入和文本嵌入到可解释的语义特征空间，从而支持可解释的零样本分类和图像检索等新视觉任务。
AI.result: 在四个标准基准上，MM-CBM相比现有方法平均准确率提升高达51.26%，同时保持高性能，与黑盒模型性能差距仅约5%，显著提升了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: MM-CBM通过多模态对齐和双重概念瓶颈机制有效解决了CBM的泛化限制和信息泄露问题，在保持高精度的前提下大幅增强了模型的可解释性，为可解释视觉推理开辟了新方向。

title: AgentFinVQA: A Deployable Multi-Agent Pipeline for Auditable Financial Chart QA
summary: Financial chart question answering in regulated settings demands more than accuracy: practitioners must know which answers to trust before acting on them, and many institutions cannot send client data to external model providers. Yet existing chart-QA agents are accuracy-focused and opaque, and most assume proprietary API access; to our knowledge, none combines auditability with on-premise deployability without significant accuracy compromise. We present AgentFinVQA, a multi-agent pipeline that decomposes each query into planning, OCR, legend grounding, visual inspection, and verification, recording every step in a traceable Model Evaluation Packet (MEP) per sample. On FinMME, AgentFinVQA improves $+7.68$ pp over a primary-backbone matched zero-shot baseline with a proprietary backbone (Gemini-3 Flash; 71.24% vs. 63.56%, McNemar $p \approx 1.1 \times 10^{-16}$), and $+4.84$ pp with open-weights Qwen3.6-27B-FP8 served locally. The verifier's verdict also serves as a useful confidence signal (68.2% vs. 55.6% exact accuracy on confirmed vs. revised answers), enabling human-in-the-loop review routing. Error analysis shows that question misunderstanding, legend confusion and extraction error account for nearly two-thirds of failures and are the categories least detected by the verifier, identifying clear directions for future work. Together these results show that auditable, on-premise financial chart QA is practical and that the open-weights system keeps most of the accuracy gains while enabling full data residency. We release our code to support reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: AgentFinVQA是一个多智能体管道，将金融图表问答分解为规划、OCR、图例接地、视觉检查和验证五个步骤，并记录每个样本的可追溯模型评估包（MEP），在保持审计性和本地部署能力的同时，在FinMME基准上相对零样本基线提升了+7.68个百分点（使用专有骨干）和+4.84个百分点（使用本地开源模型）。
AI.motivation: 现有图表问答智能体主要关注准确性且不透明，大多数假设专有API访问权限，而金融监管场景不仅需要准确性，还要求可信度评估和数据驻留本地化——从业者必须在采取行动前知道哪些答案可以信任，且许多机构无法将客户数据发送给外部模型提供商；此前尚无方法能在不显著牺牲准确性的前提下同时实现可审计性和本地部署。
AI.method: AgentFinVQA采用多智能体管道架构，将每个查询分解为规划、OCR、图例接地、视觉检查和验证五个子任务，每个子任务由独立的智能体模块执行，并在每个样本的处理过程中记录完整的可追溯模型评估包（MEP），支持审计追踪；系统支持两种骨干模型方案：专有的Gemini-3 Flash和开源的Qwen3.6-27B-FP8（本地部署）。
AI.result: 在FinMME基准上，AgentFinVQA相对零样本基线提升显著：使用专有骨干Gemini-3 Flash时准确率达71.24%（vs. 63.56%，提升+7.68个百分点，McNemar检验p≈1.1×10⁻¹⁶），使用本地部署的开源Qwen3.6-27B-FP8时提升+4.84个百分点；验证器的判定提供了有效的置信度信号，确认答案的准确率为68.2%，修订答案为55.6%；错误分析表明，问题误解、图例混淆和提取错误占失败案例近三分之二，且是验证器最难检测的类别。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，可审计且支持本地部署的金融图表问答是可行的，开源权重系统在保持大部分准确率提升的同时实现了完整的数据驻留；验证器可作为有效的人机协同审查路由信号，而错误分析揭示了未来工作的明确改进方向——重点解决问题理解、图例推理和提取精度三个薄弱环节。

title: PsyScore: A Psychometrically-Aware Framework for Trait-Adaptive Essay Scoring and ZPD-Scaffolded Feedback
summary: Effective Automated Essay Scoring (AES) are expected to support both reliable assessment and actionable instructional feedback. However, existing approaches often treat scoring and feedback as separate components: neural scoring models provide limited interpretability, while Large Language Model (LLM)-based feedback is typically insensitive to learners proficiency levels. To address this fragmentation, this work proposes PsyScore, a psychometrically-aware framework that integrates diagnostic assessment with instructional scaffolding through a shared latent ability representation. PsyScore comprises three key modules: a Trait-Adaptive Neural IRT Scorer that incorporates the Graded Partial Credit Model (GPCM) into a neural architecture, enabling the precise estimation of student ability while maintaining psychometric interpretability, a ZPD-Scaffolded Feedback Generator, which conditions multi-agent feedback strategies on the diagnosed ability parameter to adapt instructional focus across different proficiency levels, and a Multi-Perspective Feedback Evaluation Strategy that assesses feedback quality via pairwise preference judgements and student revision simulations. Experiments on the ASAP++ dataset demonstrate that PsyScore achieves competitive scoring performance while providing more pedagogically aligned feedback.

AI.tldr: PsyScore 提出了一种心理测量学感知的自动作文评分与反馈框架，通过共享潜在能力表征将诊断性评估与教学支架整合，在 ASAP++ 数据集上实现了具有竞争力的评分性能并提供了更具教学一致性的反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有自动作文评分（AES）方法将评分与反馈分离：神经评分模型缺乏可解释性，而基于大语言模型的反馈通常对学习者的能力水平不敏感，无法实现可靠评估与可操作教学反馈的统一。
AI.method: PsyScore 包含三个核心模块：Trait-Adaptive Neural IRT Scorer 将分级部分信用模型（GPCM）融入神经架构以实现心理测量学可解释的能力估计；ZPD-Scaffolded Feedback Generator 根据诊断出的能力参数调节多智能体反馈策略以适应不同水平学习者；Multi-Perspective Feedback Evaluation Strategy 通过成对偏好判断和学生修订模拟来评估反馈质量。
AI.result: 在 ASAP++ 数据集上的实验表明，PsyScore 在保持具有竞争力评分性能的同时，能够提供更具教学一致性的反馈。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将心理测量学原理与神经评分模型和 LLM 反馈生成相结合，能够有效弥合自动评估与教学支持之间的鸿沟，为能力感知的智能教育系统提供了可行框架。

title: SurgVista: Long-Horizon Surgical World Modeling with Plausible Instrument-Tissue Dynamics
summary: Scaling robot policy learning for autonomous surgery is challenging, as expert demonstrations are expensive and in vivo exploration poses substantial safety risks. Surgical world models address this by generating realistic, action-conditioned future frames from an initial observation, but existing methods exhibit two persistent failure modes: spatial interaction incoherence, where visible instrument contact fails to induce spatially consistent tissue deformation, and temporal fidelity collapse, where prediction errors compound across autoregressive rollouts and progressively corrupt visual quality. We present SurgVista, a surgical world model that mitigates both failures through two training recipes. Deformation Consistency Regularization extracts scene-point trajectories from training videos and enforces cross-frame coherence through latent contrastive learning, strengthening physically consistent instrument-tissue dynamics. Drift Adaptation Training mitigates long-horizon drift by perturbing conditioning frames with online prediction residuals and photometric augmentations calibrated to long-horizon drift statistics, sustaining visual fidelity over extended rollouts. To enable rigorous evaluation, we further introduce SurgWorld-Bench, featuring diverse procedure types, long-range rollouts, and decoupled metrics for instrument-motion accuracy and tissue-response fidelity. Extensive experiments show that SurgVista consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across visual quality, temporal consistency, and interaction fidelity, with gains widening as the prediction horizon grows.

AI.tldr: SurgVista 是一种面向自主手术的机器人手术世界模型，通过形变一致性正则化和漂移自适应训练两种训练策略，分别解决空间交互不连贯和时间保真度崩溃两大问题，并在新提出的 SurgWorld-Bench 基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 手术机器人策略学习面临专家演示昂贵和体内探索存在安全风险的挑战，手术世界模型虽可通过生成未来帧缓解该问题，但现有方法存在两个关键缺陷：一是空间交互不连贯，即器械接触无法引发空间一致的软组织形变；二是时间保真度崩溃，即自回归预测中误差累积导致视觉质量逐步退化。
AI.method: SurgVista 提出两种训练策略。形变一致性正则化（Deformation Consistency Regularization）从训练视频中提取场景点轨迹，通过潜在空间对比学习强制跨帧一致性，增强物理上合理的器械-组织动力学建模。漂移自适应训练（Drift Adaptation Training）利用在线预测残差和根据长程漂移统计校准的光度增强扰动条件帧，缓解长程预测中的漂移问题。此外，论文还构建了 SurgWorld-Bench 基准，涵盖多样手术类型、长程展开和分离式评估指标。
AI.result: SurgVista 在视觉质量、时间一致性和交互保真度方面持续超越现有最先进方法，且优势随着预测时域增长而进一步扩大。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了通过针对性的训练策略可以有效缓解手术世界模型中空间交互和时间退化的根本性问题，为安全、可扩展的手术机器人策略学习提供了基础，同时 SurgWorld-Bench 为后续研究提供了标准化评估平台。

title: ORAgentBench: Can LLM Agents Solve Challenging Operations Research Tasks End to End?
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents for multi-step tasks in executable environments, yet their ability to perform realistic operations research (OR) work remains unclear. Existing OR evaluations often decouple modeling from solving, rely on pre-formalized or text-only instances, and rarely test the full workflow from operational artifacts to validated decisions. In this work, we introduce ORAgentBench, an execution-grounded benchmark for evaluating autonomous agents on challenging end-to-end operations research tasks.
