It contains 107 human-reviewed tasks across diverse operational scenarios, each packaged in an isolated environment with a natural-language brief, multi-file data, configuration artifacts, and a required submission schema. Agents must write and run solution code, and their submissions are evaluated by hidden validators for schema validity, hard-constraint feasibility, and normalized objective quality. Experiments with fourteen frontier agent-model configurations show that current agents remain far from reliable OR practice. The best agent passes only 35.51% of all tasks and 20.59% of hard tasks, and many feasible submissions still fall below the required quality threshold. Failure analysis further shows that errors are dominated by strategic weaknesses, including missed operational rules, brittle formulations, weak feasible-solution construction, and insufficient solution improvement. OR-specific procedural skills increase hard-task feasibility, but do not reliably improve solution quality or pass rate. These results suggest that progress in OR agents requires moving beyond plausible optimization code toward dependable, high-quality operational decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出ORAgentBench，一个基于执行环境的多步骤运筹学任务基准，评估结果表明当前最强智能体仅通过35.51%任务，且失败主要源于策略性缺陷，而非代码生成能力不足。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在可执行环境中的自主智能体评估多集中于通用编程任务，而其在真实运筹学工作流（从操作工件到验证决策）上的完整能力尚不明确；现有OR评测常将建模与求解分离、依赖预形式化或纯文本实例，缺乏对端到端执行验证的评估。
AI.method: 构建包含107个人工审核任务的ORAgentBench基准，每个任务封装在隔离环境中，配备自然语言说明、多文件数据、配置工件及提交模式；智能体需编写并运行求解代码，通过隐藏验证器从模式合法性、硬约束可行性和归一化目标质量三个维度进行自动评估。
AI.result: 对14种前沿智能体配置的测试显示，最佳智能体仅通过35.51%的全部任务和20.59%的困难任务；失败分析表明错误主要由策略性弱点导致，包括遗漏运筹规则、脆弱建模、可行解构建不足以及解改进不充分；OR专用过程技能虽能提升困难任务可行性，但无法可靠改善解质量或通过率。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型智能体在端到端运筹学任务上远未达到可靠实践水平，OR智能体的进步需要超越生成看似合理的优化代码，转向可依赖、高质量的运营决策能力。

title: Beyond Global Replanning: Hierarchical Recovery for Cross-Device Agent Systems
summary: Real-world computer-use tasks often span multiple applications and devices, requiring agents to coordinate heterogeneous environments under dynamic runtime failures. Existing multi-device agent systems support task decomposition and cross-device assignment, but recovery remains largely coarse-grained: when execution fails, they typically retry the same strategy, reassign the subtask, or revise the global plan, without systematically modeling the device-local strategy space. This limits their ability to distinguish failures that can be repaired within the current device from those that require cross-device replanning. We propose \textbf{H-RePlan}, a hierarchical replanning framework for multi-device agents with unified API--CLI--GUI execution. H-RePlan equips each device with interchangeable execution strategies and separates device-local strategy recovery from orchestrator-level global replanning through a compact cross-layer failure abstraction. To evaluate this capability, we introduce \textbf{HeraBench}, a fault-injected benchmark that constructs cross-device workflows over Linux and Android devices and injects strategy- and device-level failures. Experiments show that H-RePlan substantially outperforms single-strategy and coarse-grained multi-device baselines, achieving higher completion, instruction adherence, and perfect-pass rates while reducing the token cost required for reliable end-to-end success. These results demonstrate that scope-aware hierarchical recovery is essential for robust multi-device agent execution.

AI.tldr: H-RePlan提出了一种面向多设备智能体的分层重规划框架，通过分离设备本地策略恢复与编排器级全局重规划，显著提升跨设备任务执行的鲁棒性；配套的HeraBench基准验证了该方法在完成率、指令遵循率和Token成本上优于粗粒度的多设备基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有跨设备智能体系统在任务执行失败时的恢复机制过于粗粒度，通常只是重试相同策略、重新分配子任务或修改全局计划，缺乏对设备本地策略空间的系统建模，无法区分当前设备内可修复的失败与需要跨设备重新规划的失败。
AI.method: H-RePlan为每个设备配备可互换的执行策略，并通过紧凑的跨层失败抽象将设备本地策略恢复与编排器级全局重规划解耦；同时构建了HeraBench基准，在Linux和Android设备上注入策略级和设备级故障以评估鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明H-RePlan在完成率、指令遵循率和完美通过率上大幅优于单策略和粗粒度多设备基线方法，同时降低了实现可靠端到端成功所需的Token成本。
AI.conclusion: 范围感知的分层恢复机制对于实现鲁棒的多设备智能体执行至关重要，统一API-CLI-GUI执行框架是构建可靠跨设备自主工作流的关键方向。

title: Timage: A Generative Text-in-Image Paradigm for Fine-Tuning Vision-Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) often lose track of the right image regions during fine-grained spatial reasoning, because a textual query rarely carries any explicit geometric anchor into the pixel domain. Prevailing remedies either rewire the model's weights or pad the prompt with verbose instructions, yet neither reliably pins the language to the correct visual coordinates without eroding the backbone's general competence. We introduce Timage, a paradigm that recasts multimodal understanding as an alignment problem solved at the input: the query is drawn, as a typeset overlay, onto the image itself. The placement and appearance of this overlay are produced by a Constrained Schrödinger Bridge (cSB), an entropic optimal-transport sampler that factorizes layout synthesis into two coupled stochastic stages. The first stage, Region Search, transports noise toward query-aligned image zones while obeying a hard occlusion barrier that protects salient foreground content; the second stage, Appearance Shaping, sizes the glyphs through an ``ink-budget'' regularizer so that the rendered text stays legible and visually balanced. The resulting overlay behaves as an explicit attention beacon that channels the model's focus along spatial semantics. On the VMCBench suite, Timage paired with a modest 7B backbone clearly overtakes far larger proprietary systems as well as parameter-tuned baselines. The study positions deliberate input reconstruction as a powerful, architecture-neutral lever for strengthening multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: Timage 提出将文本查询直接渲染为图像上的排版覆盖层，利用约束薛定谔桥（cSB）优化覆盖层的位置与外观，使多模态大模型在细粒度空间推理中无需修改模型权重即可显著提升定位精度，7B 模型性能超越更大规模专有系统与参数微调基线。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在细粒度空间推理时，文本查询缺乏显式几何锚点，导致模型难以准确定位图像中的正确区域；现有方法如权重微调或冗长指令提示要么侵蚀骨干模型通用能力，要么无法可靠地将语言绑定到正确视觉坐标上。
AI.method: Timage 将多模态理解重新定义为输入层面的对齐问题：通过约束薛定谔桥（cSB）将文本查询以排版覆盖层的形式直接绘制到图像上；cSB 作为熵最优传输采样器，将布局合成分解为两个耦合的随机阶段——区域搜索阶段在硬性遮挡屏障保护下将噪声向查询对齐的图像区域传输，外观塑造阶段通过“墨水预算”正则化调整字形大小以保证可读性与视觉平衡。
AI.result: 在 VMCBench 基准测试上，使用 7B 骨干网络的 Timage 显著超越了大规模专有系统以及参数微调基线，表明输入重构策略在不修改模型参数的情况下有效增强了多模态推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将输入重构定位为一种架构中立的通用杠杆，通过有意识地在输入层面构造显式注意力信标来强化多模态空间语义理解，为无需修改模型权重的多模态推理增强提供了新范式。

title: Human-on-the-Loop Orchestration for AI-Assisted Legal Discovery
summary: Autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in electronic discovery (e-discovery), where compounding errors across multi-step reasoning chains can constitute legal malpractice. Unlike single-turn retrieval, agentic workflows operating over privileged document corpora exhibit a class of failure we term "trajectory collapse": an early misclassification silently propagates, rendering an entire privilege review invalid. This paper makes three contributions. First, we propose a structured taxonomy of agentic failures in legal information retrieval, organized by functional stage. Second, we introduce a four-layer verification architecture -- spanning planning, reasoning, execution, and uncertainty quantification -- designed to intercept these failures before they compound. Third, we present a preliminary simulation study on a synthetic e-discovery corpus that demonstrates how mandatory Human-on-the-Loop (HOTL) escalation thresholds reduce privilege-waiver risk relative to fully autonomous baselines. Our results suggest that calibrated uncertainty thresholds can reduce privilege-waiver risk by up to 61% versus fully autonomous deployment, while routing fewer than one quarter of documents to attorney review.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向电子取证中自主LLM代理的结构化故障分类法，并设计了四层验证架构（涵盖规划、推理、执行和不确定性量化），通过人机协同升级阈值将特权弃权风险降低多达61%，同时仅需将不到四分之一的文档提交给律师审查。
AI.motivation: 自主LLM代理在多步推理链条中容易产生复合性错误，尤其是在电子取证领域，早期错误分类会在特权文档审查流程中无声传播，导致整个审查失效（即"轨迹坍缩"），从而构成法律渎职风险；现有方法缺乏针对代理式工作流在法律信息检索中系统性故障的识别与防范机制。
AI.method: 本文首先提出了按功能阶段组织的代理式故障结构化分类法；其次，设计了一种四层验证架构，涵盖规划（planning）、推理（reasoning）、执行（execution）和不确定性量化（uncertainty quantification）四个层面，用于在错误复合之前进行拦截；最后，在合成电子取证语料库上进行了初步仿真实验，采用强制性人机协同（Human-on-the-Loop, HOTL）升级阈值策略与完全自主基线进行对比。
AI.result: 仿真实验结果表明，校准后的不确定性阈值策略相比完全自主部署可将特权弃权风险降低高达61%，同时路由至律师审查的文档比例不足四分之一，在风险控制与人工负担之间实现了有效平衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了自主LLM代理在法律检索中存在结构性故障模式，验证了结合不确定性量化与强制性人机协同升级机制在降低法律风险方面的有效性，为代理式工作流在高风险法律场景中的安全部署提供了设计原则和初步实证依据。

title: Vision-Reasoning-Guided Occlusion Removal from Light Fields
summary: Occlusion-robust scene recovery remains a major challenge in computational imaging, particularly in natural environments where dense foreground vegetation severely limits visibility. We propose a vision-reasoning-guided light field occlusion removal framework that combines the visibility recovery capability of light field integration (LFI) with the semantic reasoning capacity of vision-language models (VLMs). Multi-view observations are first integrated via LFI to suppress foreground occlusions and produce an initial visibility-enhanced representation. A VLM is then incorporated as a conditional semantic prior to restore degraded structures and recover fine details, guided by the observed measurements. To improve recovery consistency and reduce hallucination artifacts, we introduce a multi-sample fusion strategy that aggregates multiple generated hypotheses into a unified estimate. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving the highest average SSIM across four synthetic light field benchmark scenes (4-Syn) and strong generalization across structured and unstructured acquisition settings. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining physical imaging constraints with vision-language reasoning for robust perception under severe occlusion, with applicability to search-and-rescue and exploratory robotic navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合光场积分（LFI）与视觉语言模型（VLM）的视觉-推理引导光场遮挡去除框架，通过多视角观测融合与语义先验引导，在严重遮挡场景下实现了高鲁棒性的场景恢复，并在合成与真实数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 在自然环境中，密集的前景植被等严重遮挡物会极大限制可见性，导致遮挡鲁棒的场景恢复仍然是计算成像领域的一个重大挑战，传统方法难以同时兼顾物理成像约束与高层语义理解。
AI.method: 提出一个视觉-推理引导的光场遮挡去除框架，首先通过光场积分（LFI）融合多视角观测以抑制前景遮挡并生成初始的可见性增强表征；随后引入视觉语言模型（VLM）作为条件语义先验，根据观测数据指导恢复退化的结构并重建精细细节；最后采用多样本融合策略聚合多个生成假设以提升恢复一致性并减少幻觉伪影。
AI.result: 在四个合成光场基准场景（4-Syn）上取得了最高的平均SSIM，并在结构化和非结构化采集场景下展现出强泛化能力，验证了物理成像约束与视觉-语言推理相结合在严重遮挡下实现鲁棒感知的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将物理成像约束与视觉-语言推理相结合能够显著提升严重遮挡场景下的鲁棒感知能力，对搜索救援和探索性机器人导航等应用具有重要价值，为未来融合多模态先验与计算成像提供了新思路。

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Black-Box Uncertainty Estimation Methods for Large Language Models
summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown strong capabilities across a wide range of tasks, their outputs often remain unreliable and may contain hallucinations, making uncertainty estimation (UE) essential for building trustworthy LLMs. In practice, many mainstream LLMs are only accessible through restricted APIs, where internal signals such as logits and hidden states are unavailable, making black-box UE especially important. However, existing work on black-box UE for LLMs remains fragmented in methodology and lacks a unified empirical comparison. To address this gap, we present a systematic review of black-box UE methods and organize them into five categories: verbalization-based, sampling-based, explanation-based, multi-agent, and hybrid methods. We further build a unified evaluation framework and benchmark 24 representative methods across 4 models and 4 dataset settings. Our results show that no single method consistently dominates across all settings. Nevertheless, methods that reason over and compare candidates in the answer space are generally effective, and hybrid methods that combine multiple uncertainty signals perform well under most conditions. By releasing the benchmark data and a unified evaluation framework, we aim to facilitate reproducible comparisons and support future research, while our empirical findings provide practical guidance for developing future black-box UE methods for LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文对大型语言模型的黑盒不确定性估计方法进行了系统综述，将现有方法归纳为五类，并通过统一的评估框架在多种模型和数据集上对24种代表性方法进行了基准测试，发现没有单一方法能在所有设置中占优，但基于答案空间推理比较的混合方法通常表现良好。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在实际部署中常通过受限API访问，无法获取logits和隐藏状态等内部信号，使得黑盒不确定性估计至关重要；然而，该领域的方法论研究较为零散，缺乏统一的实证比较和标准化评估框架。
AI.method: 该研究首先对黑盒不确定性估计方法进行了系统分类，归纳为五类：基于言语化、基于采样、基于解释、基于多智能体以及混合方法；随后构建了一个统一的评估框架，对24种代表性方法在4种模型和4种数据集设置下进行了全面的基准测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，没有任何单一方能够在所有设置中持续占据主导地位；但总体而言，在答案空间中对候选结果进行推理和比较的方法普遍有效，而结合多种不确定性信号的混合方法在大多数条件下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过发布基准数据和统一评估框架，为黑盒不确定性估计的可重复比较和未来研究提供了支持；其经验发现为开发更可靠的LLM黑盒不确定性估计方法提供了实践指导。

title: PU-UNet: Stable Multiplicative Interactions for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Many dense prediction networks rely on additive feature transformations and model higher-order feature interactions only implicitly. Product units provide an explicit mechanism for multiplicative feature modeling, but their logarithmic--exponential formulation can cause numerical instability, which has limited their use in deep dense prediction networks. In this work, we propose Product-Unit U-Net (PU-UNet), a residual U-Net that integrates stable product-unit residual blocks into rich low-resolution stages for medical image segmentation. The proposed formulation combines smooth positivity mapping with log-domain clipping, enabling stable multiplicative feature learning with negligible computational overhead. On ISIC 2018, Kvasir-SEG, and BUSI, PU-UNet achieves Dice scores of 0.942, 0.959, and up to 0.925, respectively. Compared with a matched Residual U-Net baseline, PU-UNet consistently improves Dice and IoU while keeping parameters, FLOPs, and inference latency nearly unchanged, and reduces the image-level false-positive rate on normal BUSI cases from 0.077 to zero. Ablation studies suggest that the gains are associated with product-unit interactions, are strongest under low-resolution placement, and benefit from the proposed stabilization design. These results suggest that stable product-unit residual learning can be an effective way to enhance U-Net-style segmentation networks with explicit multiplicative interactions.

AI.tldr: 提出PU-UNet，一种将稳定乘积单元残差块集成到U-Net低分辨率阶段的网络，通过平滑正映射和对数域裁剪实现稳定的显式特征乘法学习，在多项医学图像分割任务中取得Dice分数提升且计算开销几乎不变。
AI.motivation: 现有密集预测网络多依赖加性特征变换，对高阶特征交互仅进行隐式建模；乘积单元可提供显式乘法建模机制，但其对数-指数形式存在数值不稳定性，限制了其在深度密集预测网络中的应用。
AI.method: 提出PU-UNet（Product-Unit U-Net），在残差U-Net的丰富低分辨率阶段集成稳定的乘积单元残差块，通过平滑正映射（smooth positivity mapping）与对数域裁剪（log-domain clipping）实现稳定的乘法特征学习，计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.result: 在ISIC 2018、Kvasir-SEG和BUSI数据集上分别达到0.942、0.959和最高0.925的Dice分数；与匹配的Residual U-Net基线相比，PU-UNet在参数量、FLOPs和推理延迟几乎不变的情况下持续提升Dice和IoU，并将正常BUSI病例的图像级假阳性率从0.077降至零。
AI.conclusion: 消融研究表明性能提升与乘积单元交互相关，在低分辨率层放置时效果最强，且得益于所提出的稳定化设计；稳定的乘积单元残差学习是增强U-Net风格分割网络显式乘法交互的有效途径。

title: MetaResearcher: Scaling Deep Research via Self-Reflective Reinforcement Learning in Adversarial Virtual Environments
summary: Deep research agents have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in autonomous information gathering and synthesis, yet their training remains constrained by the static nature of simulated environments, the limits of fact-retrieval-only task designs, and the inefficiency of outcome-based reinforcement learning. In this work, we propose MetaResearcher, a novel framework that scales deep research agent training across four synergistic dimensions. First, we introduce an Evolving Virtual World that injects temporal dynamics and adversarial misinformation into the training environment, forcing agents to develop source credibility assessment and temporal conflict resolution skills. Second, we design Discovery-Oriented Tasks -- including hypothesis generation and contradiction resolution -- that transcend simple fact retrieval and push agents toward genuine research behaviors. Third, we propose a Self-Reflective Meta-Reward mechanism within the GRPO framework that jointly optimizes for answer correctness, search path efficiency, reflection depth, and tool call diversity, directly addressing the repetitive action loop problem observed in prior work. Fourth, we introduce a Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Swarm architecture comprising specialized Scout, Filter, and Synthesizer models that learn collaborative research strategies through coordinated reinforcement learning. Built upon the LiteResearcher infrastructure, MetaResearcher requires zero marginal API cost for training while targeting substantial improvements in both benchmark performance (GAIA, Xbench-DS) and epistemic robustness under adversarial conditions. We present the complete framework design, training methodology, and planned experimental validation.

AI.tldr: MetaResearcher 提出一种多维协同框架，通过演化虚拟世界、发现导向任务、自反思元奖励机制和异构多智能体群架构，在零额外API成本下扩展深度研究智能体的训练，显著提升其在GAIA和Xbench-DS等基准上的表现及对抗性条件下的认知鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度研究智能体的训练面临三个关键瓶颈：模拟环境的静态性使其缺乏时序动态与对抗性信息，任务设计局限于简单事实检索而无法驱动真实研究行为，以及基于结果的强化学习效率低下且易产生重复动作循环。
AI.method: MetaResearcher 框架沿四个维度协同扩展训练：引入演化虚拟世界（Evolving Virtual World）注入时间动态与对抗性错误信息，迫使智能体发展来源可信度评估和时间冲突消解能力；设计发现导向任务（Discovery-Oriented Tasks），包括假设生成和矛盾消解，超越简单事实检索；在GRPO框架内提出自反思元奖励机制（Self-Reflective Meta-Reward），联合优化答案正确性、搜索路径效率、反思深度和工具调用多样性；采用异构多智能体群架构（Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Swarm），包含专门的Scout、Filter和Synthesizer模型，通过协同强化学习学习合作研究策略。
AI.result: 该框架基于LiteResearcher基础设施构建，训练无需边际API成本，目标在GAIA和Xbench-DS基准测试上取得显著性能提升，并在对抗性条件下增强认知鲁棒性。目前已完成完整的框架设计、训练方法论和实验验证规划。
AI.conclusion: MetaResearcher 通过多维协同训练范式有效克服了静态环境、任务设计局限和低效强化学习等核心瓶颈，为深度研究智能体的规模化训练提供了新路径，其零额外API成本特性对实际部署具有重要价值。

title: The Hidden Evolution of Disguised Visual Context inside the VLM
summary: Visual tokens enter Large Language Models (LLMs) as raw, foreign signals. How they are transformed into meaningful representations and interact with the language space depends entirely on the integration architecture. Whether by treating visual tokens as in-context prompts within the input sequence or injecting them directly into the LLM's intermediate layers. A controlled comparison and understanding of how these architectural choices affect visual information and its internal transformation to integrate with the LLM remains underexplored. We provide a fair comparison by evaluating in-context and layer-wise injection VLM integration paradigms under identical training conditions across single image, multi-image, and video benchmarks. In doing so, we uncover a hidden evolution where visual tokens enter the LLM as disguised visual context, raw representations lacking linguistic structure, but are progressively reshaped depending on the integration paradigm, each capturing fundamentally different frequency characteristics of the visual signal. We show that this evolution inside the LLM determines what visual features the VLM can utilize effectively, how visual representations align with the language space, and ultimately how each paradigm performs across different tasks. We further demonstrate that attention allocation alone is insufficient, and that performance is driven by the quality of visual representations at each layer.

AI.tldr: 本文通过公平控制实验条件，系统比较了视觉-语言模型中视觉令牌的上下文注入与逐层注入两种范式，揭示了视觉令牌在LLM内部从原始视觉上下文逐步演化的过程，并发现不同架构范式捕获视觉信号的不同频率特征，直接影响视觉表示质量与任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）中，视觉令牌进入大语言模型（LLM）的方式存在多种架构范式（如作为上下文提示注入输入序列，或直接注入LLM中间层），但这些架构选择如何影响视觉信息的内部转换及其与语言空间的交互机制尚未得到系统性的公平比较与深入理解，该研究旨在填补这一关键空白。
AI.method: 研究采用公平对比实验框架，在完全相同的训练条件下，系统评估了两种主流VLM集成范式——上下文注入（in-context）与逐层注入（layer-wise injection），并在单图像、多图像和视频三种基准任务上进行性能比较，同时通过分析视觉令牌在LLM内部各层的表示演化过程揭示其内在机制。
AI.result: 研究发现视觉令牌进入LLM时最初表现为"伪装的视觉上下文"（disguised visual context），即缺乏语言结构的原始表示，随后随层数加深而逐步重塑；不同集成范式捕获了视觉信号截然不同的频率特征；注意力分配本身不足以解释性能差异，各层的视觉表示质量才是驱动模型表现的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM中视觉令牌在LLM内部存在一个隐藏的演化过程，该过程决定了模型能够有效利用哪些视觉特征、视觉表示与语言空间的对齐程度，以及不同范式在不同任务上的表现差异，为未来VLM架构设计提供了重要的理论指导。

title: Multi-Agent Transactive Memory
summary: The decentralized deployment of LLM agents with diverse capabilities across diverse tasks motivates infrastructure for knowledge sharing across heterogeneous agent populations. Just as search engines index human-generated artifacts to support human problem solving, retrieval systems can organize agent-generated artifacts for reuse across agent populations. We extend retrieval-augmented generation - which demonstrates the value of human-authored artifacts to individual agents - to retrieval of agent-generated artifacts supporting a population of agents. In particular, agent trajectories encode reusable procedural knowledge, yet these artifacts are typically discarded after a single use or retained only by the producing agent, forcing newly instantiated agents to repeatedly rediscover existing solutions. We propose Multi-Agent Transactive Memory (MATM), a framework for population-level storage and retrieval of agent-generated trajectories, where producer agents contribute trajectories to a shared repository and consumer agents retrieve them to improve task execution. We focus on interactive environments (ALFWorld and WebArena), where trajectories are long and encode especially rich procedural structure. Our experiments demonstrate that retrieving trajectories from MATM improves downstream task performance and reduces interaction steps without coordination or joint training. These results position MATM as a design pattern for population-level experience sharing in open agent ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 提出多智能体变迁记忆（MATM）框架，实现跨异构智能体群体对智能体生成轨迹的群体级存储与检索，在交互式环境中提升下游任务性能并减少交互步骤。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体的去中心化部署与多样化任务需求催生了跨异构智能体群体的知识共享基础设施需求，然而智能体轨迹这类编码了可复用程序性知识的工件通常被单次使用后丢弃或仅由生产智能体保留，导致新实例化的智能体需要反复重新发现已有解决方案，缺乏有效的群体级知识复用机制。
AI.method: 提出多智能体变迁记忆（MATM）框架，将检索增强生成（RAG）从个体智能体从人类创作工件中检索扩展至智能体生成轨迹的群体级存储与检索，生产智能体将轨迹贡献到共享存储库，消费智能体检索相关轨迹以改进任务执行，无需协调或联合训练。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebArena等交互式环境中，实验表明从MATM中检索轨迹能够提升下游任务性能并减少交互步骤，验证了群体级经验共享的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MATM可作为开放智能体生态系统中群体级经验共享的设计模式，通过复用智能体生成的轨迹知识提升异构智能体群体的任务效率，无需依赖智能体间的协调或联合训练。

title: Holo-World: Unified Camera, Object and Weather Control for Video World Model
summary: Video world models are moving toward preserving an observed world under controllable camera and object motion while allowing its environmental state to change. Yet these controls remain isolated, and weather generation typically relies on a source video or reconstructed scene that already specifies future structure. We study a first-frame-anchored source-to-state setting, where the model starts from a single image and follows explicit camera and object controls and an optional weather instruction, then generates a video that either preserves the source world or transfers it to a target weather state. To address these challenges, we first build HoloStateData, a state video dataset that turns diverse videos into unified control samples for camera, object, and weather supervision. Second, we introduce Holo-World, a unified controllable video world model that jointly controls scene from a single image. Its Unified Scene Adapter factorizes world preservation and weather transfer into distinct parameter subspaces, using rendered background, geometry buffers, and object controls to maintain controlled scene structure while modeling weather-dependent appearance and particle effects. Additionally, Scene-Weather Decomposed CFG guides scene and weather residuals separately, strengthening target weather effects without over-amplifying the full condition. Quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that Holo-World maintains precise camera and object control with consistent scene structure while transferring scenes into diverse target weather state, outperforming video-to-video weather editing baselines on weather-state generation. Our project page is available at \url{https://xiangchenyin.github.io/Holo-World/}.

AI.tldr: 提出了Holo-World，一种从单张图像出发、联合控制相机、物体运动和天气状态的第一帧锚定视频世界模型，通过统一数据集HoloStateData和解耦场景保持与天气迁移的架构，实现了在可控视角和物体运动下将场景迁移到多种目标天气状态， outperforms视频到视频的天气编辑方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型中，相机控制和物体控制相互独立，天气生成通常依赖于源视频或已重构场景来指定未来结构，缺乏从单张图像出发同时控制相机、物体运动并实现天气状态迁移的统一框架。
AI.method: 首先构建了HoloStateData数据集，将多样化视频转化为包含相机、物体和天气监督的统一控制样本；然后提出Holo-World统一可控视频世界模型，其核心是Unified Scene Adapter，将世界保持和天气迁移分解为不同的参数子空间，利用渲染背景、几何缓冲和物体控制来维持受控场景结构，同时建模天气相关的外观和粒子效果；此外，Scene-Weather Decomposed CFG分别引导场景和天气残差，增强目标天气效果而不过度放大完整条件。
AI.result: 定量和定性实验表明，Holo-World能够在保持精确相机和物体控制及一致场景结构的同时，将场景迁移到多种目标天气状态，在天气状态生成任务上优于视频到视频的天气编辑基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了从单张图像出发进行可控视频世界建模中联合控制相机、物体和天气的可行性，为将可控视频生成拓展到环境状态迁移提供了有效的分解式架构，未来可朝更复杂的环境状态和更丰富的外部控制指令方向扩展。

title: ENPIRE: Agentic Robot Policy Self-Improvement in the Real World
summary: Achieving dexterous robotic manipulation in the real world heavily relies on human supervision and algorithm engineering, which becomes a central bottleneck in the pursuit of general physical intelligence. Although emerging coding agents can generate code to automate algorithm search, their successes remain largely confined in digital environments. We conjecture that the missing abstraction to automate robotics research is a repeatable feedback loop for real-world policy improvement: reset the scene, execute a policy, verify the outcome, and refine the next iteration. To bridge this gap, we introduce ENPIRE, a harness framework for coding agents that instantiates this physical feedback routine with four core modules: an Environment module (EN) for automatic reset and verification, a Policy Improvement module (PI) that launches policy refinement, a Rollout module (R) to evaluate policies with one or multiple physical robots operating in parallel, and an Evolution module (E) in which coding agents analyze logs, consult literature, improve training infrastructure and algorithm code to address failure modes. This closed-loop system transforms real-world manipulation learning into a controllable optimization procedure, minimizing human effort while allowing fair ablations across training recipe and agent variants. Powered by ENPIRE, frontier coding agents can autonomously train a policy to achieve a 99% success rate on challenging, dexterous manipulation tasks, such as organizing a pin box, fastening a zip tie, and tool use, a process that further accelerates when we dispatch an agent team on a robot fleet. Our results suggest a practical and scalable path toward deploying coding agents to autonomously advancing robotics in the physical world.

AI.tldr: ENPIRE是一个为编码智能体设计的框架，通过场景重置、策略执行、结果验证和迭代改进的物理反馈闭环，使前沿编码智能体能够在真实世界中自主训练灵巧操作策略，在整理针盒、拉紧扎带和工具使用等任务上达到99%的成功率，为部署编码智能体自主推进实体机器人研究提供了可扩展的路径。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的灵巧机器人操作严重依赖人工监督和算法工程，这成为追求通用物理智能的核心瓶颈。尽管新兴的编码智能体能够生成代码来自动化算法搜索，但其成功主要局限于数字环境，缺乏一种能够在物理世界中实现策略迭代改进的可重复反馈循环的抽象机制。
AI.method: ENPIRE框架包含四个核心模块：环境模块（EN）负责自动场景重置与结果验证，策略改进模块（PI）启动策略优化，回滚模块（R）支持一台或多台物理机器人并行评估策略，进化模块（E）中编码智能体分析日志、查阅文献并改进训练基础设施和算法代码以解决失败模式。该闭环系统将真实世界操作学习转化为可控的优化过程，支持对训练方案和智能体变体进行公平消融实验。
AI.result: 在ENPIRE的支持下，前沿编码智能体能够自主训练策略，在整理针盒、拉紧扎带和工具使用等挑战性灵巧操作任务上达到99%的成功率。当在机器人集群上部署智能体团队时，这一过程能够进一步加速。
AI.conclusion: ENPIRE通过将物理反馈例程实例化为可控的优化过程，显著降低了真实世界操作学习所需的人工干预，揭示了一条向部署编码智能体以自主推进实体机器人研究的实用且可扩展的路径。

title: Stitching and dimensionality effects on large artificially generated volume datasets
summary: Generating large images via deep learning requires patching input data to accommodate hardware memory limitations, then assembling output patches, a process that can introduce stitching artifacts when neighboring patches do not align at borders. While these artifacts are known to affect segmentation tasks, their impact on generative models for style-transfer remains poorly understood. We investigated three stitching approaches and two patch dimensionalities (2D vs 3D) using cycleGAN models trained on cryo-electron microscopy datasets. We evaluated both perceptual quality and performance on downstream mitochondria segmentation. Our key findings reveal that: (1) FID scores fail to detect subtle stitching artifacts that significantly impact downstream segmentation performance, (2) 3D models with artifact-free stitching marginally outperform 2D models on downstream tasks, though the improvement barely justifies the computational cost, and (3) 2D models train more stably due to larger batch sizes. Additionally, we demonstrate that ensembling predictions from three orthogonal directions can improve low-quality volumes but provides no benefit for high-quality outputs. These results demonstrate that maximizing generative model performance on large scientific datasets requires careful consideration and mitigation of stitching artifacts, and that perceptual metrics alone are insufficient for evaluating domain adaptation quality in biomedical imaging.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了拼接伪影对基于cycleGAN的生成式风格迁移模型的影响，发现FID等感知指标无法检测到会显著影响下游分割任务的细微拼接伪影，并揭示了2D与3D模型在拼接策略下的性能-计算成本权衡。
AI.motivation: 深度学习生成大尺寸图像时因硬件内存限制需对输入数据进行分块处理，而后拼接输出块的过程可能在邻接块边界处引入拼接伪影。尽管这类伪影已知会影响分割任务，但其对用于风格迁移的生成模型的影响尚不明确，本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 使用基于cycleGAN的生成模型在冷冻电镜数据集上进行实验，系统比较了三种拼接方法和两种分块维度（2D vs 3D），从感知质量和下游线粒体分割性能两个维度进行评估，并测试了从三个正交方向进行集成预测的策略。
AI.result: 实验发现：(1) FID评分无法检测出会显著降低下游分割性能的细微拼接伪影；(2) 使用无伪影拼接的3D模型在下游任务上略优于2D模型，但性能提升难以证明其计算成本合理性；(3) 2D模型因能使用更大批次大小而训练更稳定；(4) 从三个正交方向集成预测可提升低质量体数据性能，但对高质量输出无帮助。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明在大型科学数据集上最大化生成模型性能需要仔细考虑和缓解拼接伪影，且仅依赖感知指标不足以评估生物医学影像中的域适应质量，为生成模型在科学成像领域的应用提供了重要指导。

title: Reward as An Agent for Embodied World Models
summary: While RL has become a promising tool for refining world models, existing methods largely rely on conservative rollouts near the training distribution, limiting exploration, behavioral diversity, and richer dynamic discovery. In this work, we challenge this conservative paradigm. We argue that the core limitation is not exploration itself, but the lack of reliable verification strategies to support broader exploration. Without reliable verification, expanded exploration becomes highly susceptible to reward hacking, where policies exploit imperfect rewards without achieving genuine improvement. To evaluate this motivation, we instantiate our method in embodied world models, where physical plausibility, and task completion provide a rigorous testbed for scalable RL under complex dynamics. On the verification side, we introduce Reward as an Agent, an agentic reward framework that actively evaluates generated behaviors to provide robust reward signals and mitigate reward hacking under distribution shifts. On the exploration side, we introduce Dynamic-Aware Rollout Diversification through DynDiff-GRPO, which explicitly expands action-space exploration to diversify trajectories, broaden state-action coverage, and encourage richer embodied behaviors beyond conservative rollout regimes. By unifying Reward as an Agent with DynDiff-GRPO, we enable RL on a more reliable reward foundation with substantially diversified sampling, effectively mitigating reward hacking while yielding significant accuracy gains across multiple open-source world models, thereby demonstrating that broader exploration can scale successfully when grounded in robust verification.

AI.tldr: 提出Reward as an Agent验证框架与DynDiff-GRPO探索方法，通过鲁棒奖励信号与多样化轨迹采样解决基于强化学习的世界模型微调中探索受限与奖励破解问题，在多个开源世界模型上取得显著精度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的世界模型微调方法主要依赖训练分布附近的保守 rollout，限制了探索范围、行为多样性和丰富动力学发现；其核心瓶颈并非探索本身，而是缺乏可靠的验证策略来支撑更广泛的探索——缺乏可靠验证时，扩展探索极易导致奖励破解，即策略利用不完备奖励信号而未能实现真实改进。
AI.method: 提出Reward as an Agent（奖励即智能体）框架，通过主动评估生成行为来提供鲁棒的奖励信号，缓解分布偏移下的奖励破解；同时提出Dynamic-Aware Rollout Diversification through DynDiff-GRPO，通过显式扩展动作空间探索来多样化轨迹、扩大状态-动作覆盖范围、鼓励超越保守rollout的丰富具身行为，并将两者统一实现可靠奖励基础与多样化采样的协同。
AI.result: 在多个开源世界模型上将统一框架应用于具身世界模型（以物理合理性和任务完成度作为评估基准），有效缓解了奖励破解问题，并在多个开源世界模型上取得了显著的精度提升，验证了基于鲁棒验证的扩展探索能够成功规模化。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，强化学习框架下世界模型微调的核心挑战并非探索本身，而是缺乏配套的可靠验证机制；通过构建鲁棒的奖励验证框架并配合多样化的探索策略，可以在保证可靠性的前提下实现更广泛的行为空间探索，从而获得性能的实质性提升。

title: Scalable Training of Spatially Grounded 2D Vision-Language Models for Radiology
comment: Accepted for MICCAI 2026. First two authors: equal contribution. Last two authors: equal supervision
summary: We study how to train visually grounded vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology without manual spatial annotations. We introduce RefRad2D, a large-scale bilingual (German/English) dataset of 1.2M CT and MR image-text pairs derived from clinical practice, with task-specific VQA and spatial grounding subsets generated automatically via LLM-based curation and automated segmentation. Trained on this data, our model RadGrounder jointly performs report generation, visual question answering, and spatial grounding via bounding-box detection or segmentation. On external VQA benchmarks (Slake, VQA-RAD), RadGrounder achieves competitive results with specialized medical VLMs. Adding our clinical data to the training mixture improves open-ended VQA over fine-tuning on the downstream datasets alone, showing the transferability of our dataset. Crucially, adding grounding supervision does not degrade language quality, enabling spatially verifiable outputs at no cost to VQA performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RefRad2D大规模双语（德/英）放射学视觉语言数据集，并基于该数据集训练了联合进行报告生成、VQA和空间定位的模型RadGrounder，证明了空间定位监督不会损害语言生成质量，且能迁移至外部基准取得竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学视觉语言模型通常需要大量手动空间标注（如边界框或分割掩码）来训练定位能力，获取成本高昂且难以规模化；同时缺乏支持多任务联合学习的大规模双语临床数据集，限制了模型在报告生成、VQA和空间定位上的协同能力。
AI.method: 从临床实践中构建了1.2M CT/MR图像-文本对的RefRad2D数据集，通过基于LLM的自动策展和自动分割技术生成任务特定的VQA和空间定位子集；在此基础上训练RadGrounder模型，联合执行报告生成、VQA和基于边界框检测或分割的空间定位任务。
AI.result: 在外部VQA基准（Slake、VQA-RAD）上，RadGrounder取得了与专门医学VLM竞争的结果；将临床数据加入训练混合后，在开放域VQA上优于仅在下游数据集上微调的效果；添加空间定位监督不会降低语言生成质量，在不牺牲VQA性能的前提下实现了空间可验证输出。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明通过自动化方式构建大规模双语放射学数据集是可行的，且空间定位监督可以无损地融入VLM训练中，为放射学领域开发兼具语言理解与空间认知能力的可信VLM提供了有效路径和数据基础。

title: WeGenBench: A Multidimensional Diagnostic Benchmark towards Text-to-Image Model Optimization
summary: Recent text-to-image generation models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in synthesizing highly realistic images from text inputs alone. Although existing benchmarks can evaluate the generation capabilities of various models to some extent, they struggle to comprehensively and accurately measure performance across multiple dimensions, often failing to reveal the inherent deficiencies of models in specific categories. To address these limitations, we propose WeGenBench, a novel benchmark designed for the comprehensive, multi-perspective evaluation of text-to-image generation capabilities. Our benchmark comprises a total of 4,000 test prompts across two primary categories, meticulously balanced between Chinese and English to evaluate bilingual and cross-cultural generation capabilities. Beyond macroscopic scene classification, we annotate each prompt with multi-dimensional tags tailored to the distinct content and challenges of each language, thereby refining the generation tasks into more specific sub-categories. Through a cross-dimensional evaluation mechanism leveraging both scene classifications and multi-dimensional tags, WeGenBench can precisely pinpoint model shortcomings in specific generation categories. Furthermore, to measure generation quality more accurately, we design and validate several novel evaluation metrics by integrating Vision-Language Models (VLMs), which assess model performance on domain-specific tasks from three core aspects. Crucially, our approach yields both the assessment outcomes and the detailed reasoning trajectories, facilitating a rigorous verification of the accuracy and soundness of the evaluation results. Finally, we conduct systematic benchmarking on current state-of-the-art methods and provide an in-depth analysis of the limitations present in existing models.

AI.tldr: WeGenBench是一个面向文本到图像生成模型的多维度双语基准测试框架，包含4000个中英文测试提示，通过场景分类和多维标签实现细粒度评估，并引入基于VLM的新型评价指标同时输出评估结果与推理轨迹，系统揭示了现有模型在特定生成类别上的固有缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型虽已取得显著进展，但已有基准测试难以全面、准确地从多个维度衡量模型性能，且往往无法揭示模型在特定类别生成中的固有缺陷。为此，该工作旨在构建一个能够进行多角度、细粒度综合评估的基准，以精准定位模型的不足。
AI.method: WeGenBench构建了包含4000个测试提示的基准集，涵盖两大主要类别，并精心平衡中英文以评估双语和跨文化生成能力。除宏观场景分类外，还为每个提示标注了面向不同语言内容和挑战的多维标签，将生成任务细化为具体子类别。通过场景分类与多维标签的交叉评估机制，可精确定位模型在特定生成类别上的缺陷；同时设计并验证了集成视觉语言模型（VLM）的新型评估指标，从三个核心方面评估模型在领域特定任务上的表现，并输出评估结果与详细推理轨迹以验证评价的准确性。
AI.result: 该基准包含4000个精心平衡的中英文测试提示，通过交叉维度的评估机制和基于VLM的新型指标，系统地对当前最先进的文本到图像生成方法进行了基准测试。结果表明，WeGenBench能够有效揭示现有模型在特定生成类别上的局限性，且输出评估结果与推理轨迹的双重信息有助于验证评价过程的准确性和合理性。
AI.conclusion: WeGenBench通过多维度标注、交叉评估机制和VLM驱动的评价指标，为文本到图像生成模型的评估提供了更全面、精确的框架。该工作不仅揭示了当前最先进模型的固有缺陷，还通过提供可验证的推理轨迹提升了评估结果的可信度，为未来模型的改进方向提供了明确的指导。

title: Autonomous Event-Driven Multi-Agent Orchestration for Enterprise AI at Scale
summary: Enterprise AI aims to move toward continuous event monitoring, detection, and action across specialist agents, yet existing multi-agent systems largely assume discrete request-response workflows and remain underexplored at enterprise scale. We evaluate DAG Plan and Execute and ReAct across 208 production-derived enterprise scenarios spanning Persona (<10 agents), Department (20-80), and Enterprise (200) scales, and introduce a Task Manager for continuous operation via priority inference, related-event merging, and preemption. Results show that scale, not task complexity, dominates orchestration performance: both architectures perform well at small scale but degrade at enterprise scale as agent discovery noise becomes the primary bottleneck, with simple tasks degrading more sharply than complex ones. DAG Plan and Execute offers higher precision and structured parallelization at smaller scales, but its higher overhead worsens at enterprise scale; ReAct is more robust by handling failures incrementally. The Task Manager reduces high-priority queue latency by 14-75% and improves related-event correctness by over 20 percentage points at enterprise scale.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过大规模实验评估了DAG Plan and Execute和ReAct两种多智能体架构在企业场景中的性能，发现规模而非任务复杂度是影响性能的主导因素，并提出Task Manager机制以改善连续事件监控下的优先级调度与事件合并能力。
AI.motivation: 现有企业级AI系统追求连续事件监控、检测与跨智能体协同行动，但主流多智能体系统大多基于离散的请求-响应工作流，且在企业规模下的表现尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 论文在208个生产衍生企业场景中评估了DAG Plan and Execute和ReAct两种架构，覆盖Persona（<10智能体）、Department（20-80）和Enterprise（200）三种规模，并引入Task Manager模块实现基于优先级推理、相关事件合并和抢占的连续操作机制。
AI.result: 规模而非任务复杂度是影响编排性能的主导因素：两种架构在小规模下表现良好，但在企业规模下因智能体发现噪声成为主要瓶颈而性能下降，简单任务比复杂任务退化更严重；DAG Plan and Execute在小规模下精度更高且支持结构化并行，但企业规模下开销更大，而ReAct通过增量式故障处理更加稳健；Task Manager在企业规模下将高优先级队列延迟降低14-75%，并将相关事件正确率提升超过20个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了多智能体系统在企业规模化部署中的核心瓶颈是智能体发现噪声而非任务复杂度，并验证了连续操作机制对提升大规模系统性能的有效性，为设计企业级多智能体系统提供了关键设计指引。

title: EFIQA: Explainable Fundus Image Quality Assessment via Anatomical Priors
summary: Image quality control is vital for a wide range of downstream applications. Deep learning-based image quality assessment methods typically train classifiers on dataset-specific quality labels, inheriting two limitations: (1) generalization is tied to the labeling criteria of the training set and (2) these methods cannot provide spatial feedback on where the quality is degraded, lacking explainability. In this work, we propose EFIQA, a framework that requires no quality-related supervision and produces spatial quality maps by design. Rather than learning ``what is degradation" from human-annotated labels, EFIQA learns ``what should be there" by leveraging anatomical priors. For fundus photography, we instantiate this as a two-stage approach, by first training an unsupervised anomaly detector via masked anatomical inpainting to identify regions of missing vasculature, and then distilling this prior knowledge into a shallow adapter mapping features of a frozen foundation model to precise quality maps. External-dataset evaluation demonstrates that this label-free approach with minimal adaptation achieves better performance and explainability compared with supervised methods across benchmarks with different quality criteria, highlighting its potential for real-world applications.

AI.tldr: EFIQA 提出一种无需质量标注的框架，通过掩膜解剖修复学习“应当存在什么”而非“什么是退化”，生成空间质量图，在外部数据集上超越监督方法并具备可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像质量评估方法依赖数据集特定的质量标签进行训练，导致两个关键局限：(1) 模型的泛化能力受限于训练集的标注标准；(2) 无法提供空间层面的质量退化反馈，缺乏可解释性。因此，亟需一种无需质量监督且能生成空间质量图的通用框架。
AI.method: EFIQA 采用两阶段无监督框架。第一阶段，通过掩膜解剖修复训练无监督异常检测器，学习眼底图像中“应当存在”的解剖先验（如血管结构），从而识别血管缺失等退化区域。第二阶段，将学到的先验知识蒸馏到一个浅层适配器中，该适配器将冻结的视觉基础模型的特征映射为精确的空间质量图，实现无需质量标签的端到端质量评估。
AI.result: 在外部数据集上的评估表明，EFIQA 作为无标签方法，仅需极少的适配即可在多个具有不同质量标注标准的基准测试中，取得优于监督方法的性能，并同时提供空间质量图以实现更好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: EFIQA 证明了通过解剖先验替代人工质量标签进行图像质量评估的可行性，摆脱了对标注标准和数据集特异性的依赖，同时兼具高可解释性，为真实场景下的质量控制系统提供了通用且可靠的解决方案。

title: A Multi-Agent system for Multi-Objective constrained optimization
comment: Presented at the 17th Workshop on Optimization and Learning in Multiagent Systems (OptLearnMAS, https://optlearnmas.github.io), co-located with the 25th International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2026)
summary: Many decision-making problems in computing and networking systems can be naturally formulated as cost-minimization problems under performance constraints. In dynamic environments, reinforcement learning (RL) is often used to solve such problems at runtime by embedding both costs and constraint violations into a single scalar reward through weighted penalty terms, following a Lagrangian-inspired formulation. However, in this context the behavior of the learned policy critically depends on the choice of these weights, which are typically selected manually. This makes it difficult to identify an appropriate trade-off between optimizing the primary objective and effectively avoiding constraint violations, particularly in non-stationary environments where their relative importance may change. This paper presents MAMO (Multi-Agent system for Multi-Objective constrained optimization), an approach to tackle this balancing problem through multi-agent RL. MAMO decouples task execution from objective design by formulating the selection of reward weights as a learning problem, providing a !rst step towards more autonomous and robust RL-based solutions for constrained optimization problems in dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 提出 MAMO，一种基于多智能体强化学习的方法，将奖励权重的选择本身建模为学习问题，从而在动态环境下自动平衡代价最小化与约束违反之间的权衡，无需手动调节权重。
AI.motivation: 在计算与网络系统的决策优化中，强化学习常通过拉格朗日启发式方法将代价和约束违反加权为单一标量奖励，但奖励权重的选择高度依赖人工调参，难以在非平稳环境中自适应地平衡主目标优化与约束满足之间的相对重要性。
AI.method: MAMO 采用多智能体强化学习框架，将任务执行与目标设计解耦，把奖励权重的选择形式化为一个独立的学习问题，从而自动动态调整各目标之间的权衡，避免手动设定权重。
AI.result: 本文为动态环境下的约束优化问题提供了一种更自主、更鲁棒的强化学习解决方案，但摘要中未报告具体的定量实验结果或基准对比数据。
AI.conclusion: MAMO 是迈向自主、鲁棒的强化学习求解动态约束优化问题的重要第一步，其核心启示在于通过元层次的学习自动调节目标权重，有望显著提升策略在非平稳环境中的适应性。

title: HEad and neCK TumOR (HECKTOR) 2025: Benchmark of Segmentation, Diagnosis, and Prognosis in Multimodal PET/CT
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Overview paper for the HECKTOR 2025 challenge, held as a satellite event at MICCAI 2025. Challenge website: https://hecktor.grand-challenge.org/
summary: Head and neck cancers (HNC) represent a significant global health burden, with accurate tumor delineation being essential for effective radiotherapy planning. The complexity of the oropharyngeal anatomy, combined with the heterogeneous appearance of tumors on imaging, makes manual segmentation time-intensive and subject to inter-observer variability. Beyond segmentation, predicting long-term clinical outcomes, such as recurrence-free survival (RFS), and determining human papillomavirus (HPV) status from noninvasive imaging, remain challenging yet clinically valuable goals. The HECKTOR 2025 challenge addresses these needs by establishing a comprehensive benchmark for automated HNC analysis using multimodal PET/CT imaging and electronic health records. Building on previous editions (2020-2022), this challenge features an expanded multi-institutional dataset comprising over 1,100 patients from 10 centers worldwide. Participants were tasked with three complementary objectives: (1) segmenting primary gross tumor volumes (GTVp) and metastatic lymph nodes (GTVn), (2) predicting recurrence-free survival, and (3) classifying HPV status. The challenge attracted 35 registered teams, with 15 final submissions evaluated on a held-out test set. Top-performing algorithms achieved a mean Dice similarity coefficient of 0.75 for segmentation, a concordance index of 0.66 for survival prediction, and a balanced accuracy of 0.56 for HPV classification. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of the submitted methodologies, evaluates their performance across different lesion characteristics, and discusses their implications for clinical translation in automated oncology workflows and decision support systems.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了HECKTOR 2025挑战赛，该挑战基于超过1100名患者的多中心PET/CT数据，建立了头颈癌自动分析的综合基准，涵盖肿瘤分割（平均Dice 0.75）、无复发生存预测（C-index 0.66）和HPV状态分类（平衡准确率0.56）三项任务，并系统分析了15个最终提交方法的性能及其临床转化潜力。
AI.motivation: 头颈癌的精准肿瘤勾画对放疗至关重要，但口咽解剖结构复杂、影像表现异质性强，导致手动分割耗时且存在观察者间变异。此外，通过无创影像预测无复发生存期和HPV状态仍具有挑战性但具有重要临床价值，现有研究缺乏面向这些互补任务的多中心综合基准。
AI.method: HECKTOR 2025挑战赛基于来自全球10个中心、超过1100名患者的多模态PET/CT影像及电子健康记录数据，设立三项互补任务：原发性肿瘤和转移淋巴结的分割、无复发生存预测以及HPV状态分类。挑战赛吸引了35支注册团队，最终15个方案在保留测试集上进行了评估。
AI.result: 在头颈癌自动分析中，最优算法在分割任务上达到平均Dice相似系数0.75，在生存预测上达到一致性指数0.66，在HPV分类上达到平衡准确率0.56。论文还系统评估了不同方法在不同病灶特征下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文对15个最终提交方法的全面分析揭示了当前自动化头颈癌分析技术的性能水平与局限性，讨论了其在自动化肿瘤学工作流和临床决策支持系统中的转化前景，并为后续研究提供了多中心基准。

title: Navigating Unreliable Parametric and Contextual Knowledge: Explicit Knowledge Conflict Resolution for LLM Inference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across a wide range of language-based tasks by leveraging both extensive parametric knowledge and in-context learning ability, enabling them to incorporate external information provided in the input prompt. However, the integration of external knowledge can introduce conflicts, not only between the model's internal parametric knowledge and the external information, but also among multiple pieces of external contexts. Existing approaches typically assume that either the model or the provided context is reliable, overlooking the possibility that both sources may contain errors, and avoid conflicts by privileging one source over the other, rather than actively resolving inconsistencies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework MACR for LLM knowledge conflict resolution that moves beyond the conventional binary choice paradigm and incorporates an explicit conflict-resolution mechanism based on a multi-agent reasoning approach. Specifically, we first propose an adaptive knowledge assessment and retrieval approach that employs a modified semantic entropy measure to quantify an LLM's confidence in its answer to a given query. Based on this confidence estimation, MACR either externalizes the model's internal knowledge as textual representations or retrieves relevant external knowledge when internal knowledge is insufficient, generating basic contexts for subsequent reasoning. Then we introduce an inductive multi-agent reasoning framework with three specialized agents that, respectively, induce explicit rules, analyze potential conflicts, and resolve inconsistencies across all available contexts. Empirical results demonstrate that MACR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across benchmarks, while also providing interpretable resolutions of explicit conflicts.

AI.tldr: 提出MACR框架，通过多智能体推理机制显式解决大语言模型中内部参数知识与外部上下文信息之间的知识冲突，超越传统的二元选择范式，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在整合外部知识时可能面临内部参数知识与外部信息之间的冲突，以及多个外部上下文之间的矛盾，已有方法通常假设模型或上下文之一可靠，通过优先选择一个来源来回避冲突而非主动解决不一致，无法处理两者均可能包含错误的情况。
AI.method: 提出MACR框架，包含两个核心模块：1）基于改进语义熵的自适应知识评估与检索方法，量化模型对查询答案的置信度，据此选择外部化模型内部知识为文本表示或检索相关外部知识；2）归纳式多智能体推理框架，包含三个专业化智能体分别负责归纳显式规则、分析潜在冲突以及解决所有上下文中的不一致。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，MACR框架显著优于现有最先进基线方法，同时能够提供可解释的显式冲突解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过明确引入冲突解决机制而非简单回避冲突，多智能体推理方法有效提升了LLM在知识冲突场景下的表现，且生成的冲突解析过程具有可解释性，为未来LLM与外部知识可靠融合提供了新范式。

title: ARTEMIS: Agent-guided Reliability-aware Temporal Mask Evolution for Imperfectly Supervised Video Polyp Segmentation
summary: Imperfectly supervised video polyp segmentation (VPS) aims to learn dense, temporally consistent masks from inexpensive supervision, including weak annotations (points, scribbles) and semi-supervision with few densely labeled frames. This setting is clinically valuable but challenging due to weak contrast, ambiguous boundaries, motion blur, and specular highlights, compounded by sparse pixel-level guidance. While SAM2 can generate dense masks from sparse inputs, direct pseudo-labeling often yields geometry-degraded masks with boundary leakage, underutilizes temporal consistency, and ignores reliability. To address these issues, we propose ARTEMIS, a unified framework for imperfectly supervised VPS driven by agent-guided reliability-aware temporal mask evolution. ARTEMIS initializes coarse masks from available supervision: SAM2 converts points/scribbles, while dense labels serve as reliable anchors. A debate-and-judge vision-language agent selects reliable temporal anchors under weak supervision, which are propagated bidirectionally with SAM2 to refine unreliable or unlabeled frames. Finally, ARTEMIS trains the segmenter using temporal reliability-aware robust learning, incorporating reliability-guided reference selection, a Reference Prototype Transport Module, and reliability-aware robust loss. These components assess mask reliability, evolve anchors over time, transport target identity across frames, and down-weight noisy supervision instead of discarding difficult samples. Experiments on SUN-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB-612 under scribble, point, and limited-label settings demonstrate that ARTEMIS achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code will be released at https://github.com/wangtong627/ARTEMIS.

AI.tldr: ARTEMIS提出了一种统一框架，通过智能体引导的可靠性感知时间掩码演化，在不完美监督（弱标注和半监督）下实现视频息肉分割，在SUN-SEG和CVC-ClinicDB-612上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 不完美监督的视频息肉分割在临床上价值显著，但由于弱对比度、模糊边界、运动模糊和镜面高光等问题，再加上稀疏的像素级标注指导，导致SAM2等模型生成的伪标签存在边界泄漏、几何退化、时间一致性利用不足和可靠性忽略等问题。
AI.method: ARTEMIS框架首先利用SAM2将点或涂鸦标注转换为粗略掩码，并将密集标注作为可靠锚点；然后通过辩论与判断视觉-语言智能体在弱监督下选择可靠时间锚点，并使用SAM2进行双向传播以优化不可靠帧；最后训练分割器时采用时间可靠性感知的鲁棒学习，包括可靠性引导的参考选择、参考原型传输模块和可靠性感知鲁棒损失，以评估可靠性、演化锚点、跨帧传递目标身份并降低噪声监督权重。
AI.result: 在SUN-SEG和CVC-ClinicDB-612数据集上，分别在涂鸦标注、点标注和有限密集标注设置下进行的实验表明，ARTEMIS在所有设定下均达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: ARTEMIS通过智能体引导的可靠性感知机制有效解决了不完美监督下视频息肉分割中伪标签质量差和时间一致性不足的问题，为弱监督和半监督视频医学分割提供了统一且鲁棒的框架。

title: Lagrange: An Open-Vocabulary, Energy-Based Sparse Framework for Generalized End-to-End Driving
summary: Scaling end-to-end autonomous driving to complex, open-world environments requires perceptual models that generalize to anomalous scenarios and planners that produce kinematically valid trajectories. Existing paradigms face a distinct dichotomy between representational efficiency and generalization capacity. Dense models (e.g., occupancy networks), while geometrically robust, incur critical computational bottlenecks and struggle with high-level semantic reasoning. Conversely, sparse, query-based planners are efficient but reliant on closed-set definitions, rendering them vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) events. Although recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer open-vocabulary reasoning, their autoregressive, discrete token generation fundamentally conflicts with the continuous, high-frequency control requirements of vehicle dynamics. To address this, we propose Lagrange, an open-vocabulary, computationally sparse driving framework based on Masked Latent Fields (MLF). Rather than relying on dense volumetric reconstructions or closed-set query mechanisms, Lagrange exploits Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to encode class-agnostic object proposals into continuous semantic visual tokens. We introduce an intent-driven masked cross-attention module that temporally filters irrelevant entities, decoding the attended tokens into an implicit continuous energy field defined over spatial coordinates. By framing decision-making as a Lagrangian action minimization problem spanning this energy field, we enforce strict compliance with vehicle kinematics while executing collision avoidance. Extensive offline evaluations on both standard (nuScenes) and long-tail (CODA) benchmarks demonstrate that Lagrange establishes a promising framework for robust, interpretable, and kinematically feasible open-world autonomy.

AI.tldr: Lagrange提出了一种基于掩码潜场（MLF）的开词汇、计算稀疏的端到端自动驾驶框架，通过将视觉-语言模型编码的连续语义标记与意图驱动的交叉注意力机制结合，在隐式能量场上以拉格朗日作用量最小化问题形式实现符合车辆运动学的决策，从而在保持计算高效性的同时实现对异常场景和开集目标的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法在表征效率与泛化能力之间存在根本矛盾：稠密模型（如占据网络）几何鲁棒性强但计算瓶颈显著且缺乏高层语义推理能力；稀疏查询型规划器虽高效但依赖闭集定义，对分布外（OOD）事件脆弱；近期VLA模型虽具备开词汇推理能力，但其自回归离散分词生成方式与车辆动力学所需的连续高频控制存在本质冲突，亟需一种兼顾开集泛化、计算稀疏性与运动学可行性的统一框架。
AI.method: Lagrange框架的核心是掩码潜场（Masked Latent Fields, MLF），首先利用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）将类别无关的目标提议编码为连续语义视觉标记，然后通过一个意图驱动的掩码交叉注意力模块在时间维度上过滤无关实体，将被关注的标记解码为定义在空间坐标上的隐式连续能量场，最终将决策制定建模为在该能量场上执行的拉格朗日作用量最小化问题，从而在满足车辆运动学约束的同时实现碰撞避免。
AI.result: 在标准数据集nuScenes和长尾数据集CODA上的离线评估结果表明，Lagrange在开集泛化、计算效率和运动学可行性方面均展现出有竞争力的性能，为鲁棒、可解释且运动学可行的开世界自动驾驶建立了有效框架。
AI.conclusion: Lagrange通过将VLM编码的开词汇语义信息与基于能量场的连续优化决策相结合，有效弥合了感知泛化与运动学约束之间的鸿沟，为开放环境下端到端自动驾驶提供了一条兼具计算稀疏性、可解释性和运动学可行性的新范式，但其在真实闭环环境中的在线推理性能仍有待进一步验证。

title: HilDA: Hierarchical Distillation with Diffusion for Advancing Self-Supervised LiDAR Pre-trainin
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Maciej and Jesper contributed equally
summary: Leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) for camera-to-LiDAR knowledge distillation offers a promising solution to the scarcity of annotated data needed to represent the immense geometric and kinematic diversity of real-world autonomous driving (AD). However, current approaches typically treat VFMs as black-box teachers, relying exclusively on frame-wise feature similarity. Consequently, they do not fully exploit the teacher's layer-wise semantic structure and global context, as well as the rich spatiotemporal information inherent in LiDAR sequences. We propose HilDA, a self-supervised pretraining framework for LiDAR backbones that better captures the semantic what and geometric where needed for driving tasks. HilDA combines hierarchical distillation comprising multi-layer distillation for progressive semantic alignment and global context distillation for scene-level semantics, with a temporal occupancy diffusion objective promoting spatiotemporal consistency. Models pre-trained with HilDA achieve state-of-the-art results on cross-modal distillation benchmarks and outperform models trained via prior distillation approaches on 3D object detection, scene flow, and semantic occupancy prediction. Code available at: https://maxiuw.github.io/hilda.

AI.tldr: HilDA提出了一种针对LiDAR骨干网络的自监督预训练框架，通过分层知识蒸馏（多层蒸馏+全局上下文蒸馏）和时序占用扩散目标来更好地从视觉基础模型中迁移语义与几何知识，在3D检测、场景流和语义占用预测等任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将视觉基础模型（VFM）视为黑盒教师，仅依赖逐帧特征相似性进行跨模态蒸馏，未能充分挖掘VFM的层级语义结构、全局上下文以及LiDAR序列中蕴含的丰富时空信息，导致标注数据稀缺问题未能有效缓解。
AI.method: HilDA是一个自监督预训练框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 分层蒸馏（Hierarchical Distillation），包括多层蒸馏以逐步对齐语义信息，以及全局上下文蒸馏以捕获场景级语义；(2) 时序占用扩散目标（Temporal Occupancy Diffusion Objective），用于促进时空一致性。
AI.result: 在跨模态蒸馏基准上，使用HilDA预训练的模型取得了最先进的性能，并在3D目标检测、场景流估计和语义占用预测三个下游任务上显著超越基于先前蒸馏方法训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过分层对齐视觉基础模型的层级语义与全局上下文，并结合时序建模，能够有效提升LiDAR骨干网络在自动驾驶任务中的表示能力，为自监督跨模态学习提供了新范式。

title: Rethinking Shrinkage Bias in LLM FP4 Pretraining: Geometric Origin, Systemic Impact, and UFP4 Recipe
summary: FP4 training promises substantial reductions in memory and computation cost for LLM pretraining, yet current FP4 hardware paths and recipes, including NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin-class systems and AMD MI350-series GPUs, remain centered on E2M1 data elements. In this study, we identify a fundamental limitation of that choice: non-uniform formats such as E2M1 inherently suffer from Shrinkage Bias, a systematic negative rounding error caused by the geometric asymmetry of their representable bins. We show that this bias accumulates multiplicatively across layers and is amplified by the Random Hadamard Transform (RHT), providing a unified explanation for the training instability observed in existing E2M1-based FP4 recipes. In contrast, uniform grids (E1M2/INT4) bypass this grid-geometry error and better convert the improved bucket utilization from RHT into higher quantization quality. Based on this finding, we propose UFP4, a uniform 4-bit training recipe that applies RHT to all three training GEMMs while restricting stochastic rounding to dY alone. On Dense 1.5B, MoE 7.9B, and MoE 124B long-run pretraining, UFP4 consistently achieves lower BF16-relative loss degradation than strong E2M1-based baselines, supported by scaling-law analysis and ablation studies. Our results suggest that future accelerators should support E1M2/INT4-style uniform 4-bit grids as first-class training primitives alongside E2M1.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示E2M1非均匀格式在FP4训练中存在由几何不对称性引起的收缩偏差（Shrinkage Bias），该偏差经随机哈达玛变换放大导致训练不稳定，并提出UFP4——一种基于E1M2/INT4均匀格式的四位训练方法，在1.5B Dense、7.9B和124B MoE模型上取得优于E2M1基线的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有FP4训练硬件（如NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin及AMD MI350系列）和方案均以E2M1非均匀数据格式为核心，但该格式存在因表示区间几何不对称性导致的系统性负向舍入误差（收缩偏差），该偏差通过层间乘法累积并被随机哈达玛变换（RHT）放大，造成了E2M1方案中普遍观察到的训练不稳定问题，亟需理论解释与更优方案。
AI.method: 本文首先理论分析指出均匀网格（E1M2/INT4）能够避免非均匀格式的网格几何误差，并将RHT带来的桶利用率提升更有效地转化为量化质量改进。基于此，提出UFP4统一四位训练方案：对所有三种训练GEMM操作应用RHT，同时将随机舍入（stochastic rounding）仅限制在dY梯度上。
AI.result: 在Dense 1.5B、MoE 7.9B和MoE 124B的长程预训练中，UFP4在BF16相对损失退化指标上持续优于强E2M1基线方法，并通过尺度定律分析和消融实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明均匀四位格式（E1M2/INT4）在LLM低精度训练中优于非均匀E2M1格式，未来加速器应将E1M2/INT4作为与E2M1并列的一等训练原语加以支持，为低精度训练硬件设计提供了重要方向指引。

title: Distill Once, Adapt Life-Long: Exploring Dataset Distillation for Continual Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CTTA) aims to maintain model performance under evolving target domains by adapting online without labeled data. However, practical deployments often cannot retain the source dataset due to privacy or licensing constraints, and purely source-free CTTA methods tend to become unstable under long-term distribution shift, suffering from compounding self-training errors and catastrophic forgetting. We introduce DO-ALL (Distill Once, Adapt Life-Long), a plug-and-play framework that revisits source information in a compact and privacy-conscious form via Dataset Distillation (DD). Before deployment, DO-ALL performs DD to produce a small set of synthetic distilled anchors that summarize the source distribution. During adaptation, each target sample is matched with its most semantically aligned anchor, which provides a stable reference for various CTTA via source replay, representation alignment, and manifold-smoothing regularization. DO-ALL can be seamlessly integrated into existing CTTA algorithms, consistently improving long-term robustness across CIFAR100-C, ImageNet-C, and the CCC benchmark. This demonstrates the potential of leveraging DD to enable stable and continuous adaptation without retaining raw source data. The code is available at https://github.com/blue-531/DOALL.

AI.tldr: DO-ALL 提出通过数据集蒸馏（DD）在部署前将源数据压缩为少量合成锚点，在测试时无源持续适配中利用这些锚点进行源重放、表示对齐和流形平滑正则化，以解决源自由CTTA在长期分布漂移下的不稳定性和灾难性遗忘问题，并可作为即插即用模块提升现有CTTA算法在多个基准上的长期鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有持续测试时适配（CTTA）方法在部署后无法保留原始源数据集（受隐私或许可限制），而纯源自由的CTTA方法在长期分布漂移下容易因累积自训练误差和灾难性遗忘而变得不稳定，亟需一种既能利用源信息又无需保留原始数据的高效且稳定的适配方案。
AI.method: DO-ALL 在部署前对源数据进行数据集蒸馏（DD），生成一组小规模合成蒸馏锚点以概括源分布信息；在测试时适配阶段，为每个目标样本匹配其语义最相似的锚点，通过源重放、表征对齐和流形平滑正则化三种机制提供稳定参考，实现无需保留原始源数据的持续稳定适配，且可作为即插即用模块集成到现有CTTA算法中。
AI.result: DO-ALL 在 CIFAR100-C、ImageNet-C 和 CCC 基准测试上一致提升了多种现有CTTA算法的长期鲁棒性，验证了利用数据集蒸馏实现无需原始数据即可稳定持续适配的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DO-ALL 证明通过数据集蒸馏以紧凑且隐私友好的形式保留源信息，能够有效解决源自由CTTA在长期分布偏移下的不稳定性和遗忘问题，为隐私约束下的连续适配提供了一种通用且即插即用的解决方案框架。

title: Toward Calibrated Mixture-of-Experts Under Distribution Shift
summary: Calibration aligns a model's predictive uncertainty with the frequencies of its empirical outcomes and is important for understanding and trusting reported probabilities. Recent work shows that enforcing calibration at the level of individual predictors can improve ensemble accuracy and calibration, with mixture-of-experts (MoE) models showing strong empirical improvements in particular; however, the conditions under which calibration helps MoE are not well understood. In this work, we study how MoE models behave under distribution shift, focusing on how routing mechanisms interact with expert-level calibration. We show that expert calibration is sufficient to ensure calibration of the overall model under a broad class of distribution shifts in hard-routed models, but is insufficient for calibrating soft-routed models. To address this, we propose an adversarial reweighting that penalizes calibration errors of the routed aggregate under distribution shift, and we demonstrate that it improves the accuracy-calibration tradeoff both on average and on difficult subsets of the data, across model classes, prediction tasks, and distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究混合专家模型（MoE）在分布偏移下的校准行为，证明硬路由MoE中专家级校准足以保证整体模型校准，而软路由MoE则不足；为此提出一种对抗性重加权方法，在分布偏移下惩罚路由聚合的校准误差，从而改善准确率-校准权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示，在个体预测器层面强制校准可提升集成模型和混合专家模型的准确率与校准性能，但校准在何种条件下有助于MoE尚不明确，尤其是在分布偏移场景下，路由机制与专家级校准之间的交互影响缺乏理论理解。
AI.method: 首先从理论上分析硬路由与软路由MoE在分布偏移下的校准行为；针对软路由MoE在校准上的不足，提出一种对抗性重加权方法（adversarial reweighting），通过在分布偏移下惩罚路由聚合输出的校准误差来改善模型的准确率-校准权衡。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的对抗性重加权方法在不同模型类别、预测任务和分布偏移场景下，有效改善了模型在平均数据以及困难数据子集上的准确率-校准权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了MoE模型中路由机制与校准之间的关键关系，并提供了在分布偏移下提升MoE校准性能的有效方法，为构建更可靠的MoE模型提供了理论依据和实践指导。

title: SPOT-E: Test-Time Entropy Shaping with Visual Spotlights for Frozen VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often underperform on evidence intensive tasks because decisive visual evidence are small, localized, and easy to overlook, leading to failures in evidence readout even when high-level reasoning is intact. Prior inference-time visual interventions can improve grounding without retraining, but they are largely open-loop and lack a mechanism to verify whether highlighted evidence is actually used. We study answer-span prediction entropy as a model-internal feedback signal and show that naive entropy minimization is ambiguous, since low entropy may arise from evidence-grounded confidence or shortcut collapse. To resolve this ambiguity, we introduce low-entropy anchors and an entropy-shaping objective that reduces answer uncertainty while preserving baseline high-confidence tokens. We instantiate this principle in SPOT-E, a plug-and-play test-time method that produces question-conditioned spotlights, optimized per instance via light-weight tuning based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Across all benchmarks and different VLM families, SPOT-E yields consistent gains and improved robustness under visual corruptions. Code is publicly available at: \url{https://github.com/YinBo0927/SPOT-E}

AI.tldr: SPOT-E 是一种即插即用的测试时视觉干预方法，通过基于 GRPO 的轻量级调优优化问题条件式聚光灯，利用熵整形目标在降低答案不确定性的同时保留高置信度 token，有效解决了 VLM 在证据密集型任务中因视觉证据微小而导致的证据读取失败问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）在证据密集型任务中表现不佳，因为决定性视觉证据往往微小、局部且容易被忽略，导致即使高层推理能力完好，模型仍无法正确读取证据；现有推理时视觉干预方法虽能改进定位但缺乏验证高亮证据是否被实际使用的闭环机制。
AI.method: 提出将答案跨度预测熵作为模型内部反馈信号，并指出朴素的最小化熵是模糊的（低熵可能来自证据支撑的置信度或捷径坍塌）；为此引入低熵锚点和一个熵整形目标，在降低答案不确定性的同时保留基线高置信度 token；该方法实例化为 SPOT-E，一种即插即用的测试时方法，通过基于群体相对策略优化（GRPO）的轻量级调优，每实例优化生成问题条件式聚光灯。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和不同 VLM 家族上，SPOT-E 均取得了一致的性能提升，并在视觉损坏条件下展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 模型内部的不确定性信号（熵）可以有效指导视觉证据的优化聚焦，但需通过锚点和整形设计区分真实置信度与捷径坍塌；SPOT-E 提供了一种无需重训练、即插即用的通用改进方案，提升了 VLM 在证据密集型任务中的可靠性和鲁棒性。

title: Spectral Query-Key Product Weight Steering for Training-Free VLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often generate fluent but visually unsupported descriptions, especially by mentioning objects absent from the image. We propose QK Product Steering, a data-free, training-free, and zero-inference-cost weight edit for reducing object hallucination. The method directly edits the per-head query-key product, the operator that produces pre-softmax attention logits, by suppressing a small number of dominant singular modes in selected middle layers. The edited product is then mapped back to the query weights through a closed-form query-only update while keeping shared key weights fixed, making the edit compatible with grouped-query attention. We further decompose the QK product into symmetric and antisymmetric components to distinguish mutual content-similarity patterns from directional attention patterns. Across three GQA-based VLMs, QK Product Steering achieves an average relative CHAIR$_s$ reduction of $4.0\%$, while matched random-mode controls show negligible change. Interpretability ablations show that the hallucination signal is specific to dominant QK modes and is primarily localized to the symmetric mutual-attention channel. Overall, QK Product Steering offers a simple alternative to decoding-time mitigation, requiring no additional data, fine-tuning, or inference-time overhead while largely preserving general multimodal capability.

AI.tldr: 提出QK Product Steering方法，通过对多头注意力中查询-键乘积进行基于奇异值分解的权重编辑，在不引入数据、微调或推理开销的情况下，显著减少VLM的对象幻觉，平均CHAIRs降低4.0%。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）生成的描述虽流畅但常出现对象幻觉，即提及图像中不存在的物体，现有缓解方法多依赖解码时干预或额外数据/微调，缺乏一种轻量且无额外开销的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出QK Product Steering方法，直接编辑每头注意力中的查询-键乘积（即生成softmax前注意力logits的算子），通过抑制选定中间层中少数主导的奇异模式实现编辑；编辑后的乘积通过闭式查询权重更新映射回查询权重，同时保持共享的键权重不变，以兼容分组查询注意力；进一步将QK乘积分解为对称分量（互内容相似性模式）和反对称分量（方向性注意力模式），以定位幻觉信号。
AI.result: 在三种基于GQA的VLM上，方法实现平均相对CHAIRs降低4.0%，而随机模式对照实验几乎无变化；可解释性消融实验表明幻觉信号主要由主导QK模式承载，且主要定位在对称互注意力通道中。
AI.conclusion: QK Product Steering提供了一种简单的替代解码时缓解方案的方法，无需额外数据、微调或推理开销，同时基本保持多模态能力的完整性；研究还揭示了VLM中对象幻觉与注意力QK乘积中特定奇异模式之间的内在关联。

title: InfantFace: Detecting infant faces in neonatal clinical environments
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables; supplementary information included
summary: Reliable localisation of the neonatal face is the first step for several video-camera based non-contact assessments such as pain and distress related facial expression analysis, pain scoring, cardiorespiratory signal extraction and cessation of breathing alerts. However, major challenges persist in neonatal clinical environments. Cluttered backgrounds, illumination changes and poor lighting conditions can reduce the accuracy of face detection models. Clinical interventions, monitoring equipment and, in some cases, medical devices can obstruct the face, making visual assessment difficult. We propose a one-stage YOLOv11m-based model tailored for face detection of infants in neonatal clinical environments. We combined multiple publicly available datasets (VGGFace2, CelebA, FDDB, WIDER FACE) to train and evaluate our proposed model. We then fine-tuned our model on a neonatal research dataset involving 228 videos from 114 recording sessions of 113 independent infants. Before fine-tuning, our model achieved an AP50 of 0.87, surpassing the performance of three state-of-the-art general face detectors. Performance improved further to an AP50 of 0.96 after clinical-domain adaptation. Evaluating face detection performance across different datasets remains a challenge due to the lack of publicly available neonatal datasets. Prioritising the creation of such datasets, while upholding appropriate privacy safeguards and ethical standards in their creation and use, would greatly support further progress in this field.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于YOLOv11m的单阶段新生儿面部检测模型，通过多源通用人脸数据集预训练再在新生儿临床数据集上微调，实现了对遮挡、光照变化等复杂环境下新生儿面部的可靠检测，AP50从0.87提升至0.96。
AI.motivation: 新生儿临床环境中，杂乱背景、光照变化和遮挡（如医疗器械、监护设备）导致通用人脸检测模型精度显著下降，而可靠的面部定位是基于视频的非接触式新生儿疼痛评估、心肺信号提取和呼吸暂停预警等应用的首要步骤，现有方法难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于YOLOv11m的单阶段面部检测模型，首先在VGGFace2、CelebA、FDDB和WIDER FACE等多个公开数据集上进行预训练，然后在一个包含228个视频（来自113名独立新生儿的114次录制会话）的新生儿临床研究数据集上进行领域微调，实现面向新生儿临床环境的领域自适应。
AI.result: 预训练模型在新生儿数据集上达到了AP50为0.87的检测精度，超越了三种现有最先进的通用人脸检测器；经过临床领域微调后，AP50进一步提升至0.96，验证了领域自适应对提升新生儿面部检测性能的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明基于YOLOv11m的领域自适应方法能有效应对新生儿临床环境中的检测挑战，但公开新生儿数据集的匮乏仍是该领域进一步发展的主要瓶颈，未来应优先建设同时满足隐私保护和伦理标准的高质量新生儿面部数据集。

title: FreeStyle: Free Control of Style-Content Dual-Reference Generation from Community LoRA Mining
summary: Style-content dual-reference generation aims to synthesize an image that preserves the structure and semantics of a content reference while adopting the style of a separate style reference.Despite recent progress, this setting remains challenging because models must balance content fidelity, style alignment, and instruction following avoiding semantic leakage from the style reference.A key bottleneck is the lack of large-scale triplet data with clean content-style separation and broad long-tail style coverage.In this work, we propose FreeStyle, a scalable dual-reference generation framework based on community LoRA mining.We treat community LoRAs as compositional anchors for style and content, and design a rigorous generation and filtering pipeline to construct large-scale Style-Reference and Content-Reference triplets across multiple base models.To address content leakage, we adopt a two-stage curriculum with stage-specific disentanglement mechanisms: an attention-level enrichment constraint that suppresses style-reference leakage in the style-transfer stage, and a frequency-aware RoPE modulation strategy that targets positional-correspondence-based leakage in the harder dual-reference stage.We also introduce a benchmark covering both style-reference and dual-reference generation, with evaluations on style similarity, content preservation, aesthetics, instruction following, and leakage rejection. The benchmark incorporates a style-invariant Content Alignment Score (CAS) and introduces a calibrated VLM-based Rejection Score for evaluating generation reliability and leakage suppression.Extensive experiments show that our model achieves a strong balance among style alignment, content preservation, and leakage suppression.

AI.tldr: FreeStyle提出了一种基于社区LoRA挖掘的可扩展双参考图像生成框架，通过两阶段课程学习与解耦机制（注意力级抑制和频率感知RoPE调制）有效平衡了内容保真度、风格对齐与泄漏抑制，并在新构建的基准上实现了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 在风格-内容双参考生成任务中，现有方法难以同时兼顾内容保真度、风格对齐和指令遵循，且面临严重的语义泄漏问题（即风格参考中的语义信息污染生成结果）。关键瓶颈在于缺乏大规模、内容与风格干净分离且覆盖广泛长尾风格的三元组训练数据。
AI.method: FreeStyle框架基于社区LoRA挖掘，将社区LoRA视为风格与内容的组合锚点，设计了一套严格的生成与过滤流程，在多个基础模型上构建大规模风格-内容参考三元组。为解决内容泄漏，采用两阶段课程学习：在风格迁移阶段引入注意力级富集约束抑制风格参考泄漏；在更难的双参考阶段采用频率感知RoPE调制策略应对基于位置对应的泄漏。同时构建了包含风格参考和双参考两种设置的基准，引入风格不变的内容对齐分数（CAS）和基于校准VLM的拒绝分数（Rejection Score）。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FreeStyle在风格对齐、内容保持和泄漏抑制之间实现了强平衡。新提出的内容对齐分数（CAS）和VLM基拒绝分数有效评估了生成可靠性与泄漏抑制能力，覆盖了风格相似度、内容保存、美学质量、指令遵循和泄漏拒绝等多个评价维度。
AI.conclusion: FreeStyle通过社区LoRA挖掘和两阶段解耦机制，为双参考生成中内容-风格分离与泄漏抑制提供了可扩展的解决方案，揭示了注意力级约束和频率调制在解耦任务中的有效性，为未来长尾风格覆盖和生成可靠性评估提供了新方向。

title: S-Agent: Spatial Tool-Use Elicits Reasoning for Spatial Intelligence
summary: Real-world spatial intelligence requires reasoning over a continuous and evolving 3D world, yet existing VLMs and tool-augmented agents largely remain tied to static, stateless inference from isolated visual observations. We introduce \textbf{\textsc{S-Agent}}, a spatial tool-use agentic paradigm for understanding and reasoning over continuous multi-view images and videos. By formulating spatial reasoning as spatio-temporal evidence accumulation rather than isolated frame-level prediction, \textsc{S-Agent} reshapes spatial perception into scene-centric understanding beyond frame-centric recognition. Specifically, \textsc{S-Agent} casts the VLM as a semantic planner that decides what evidence is needed, while a hierarchy of spatial tools and experts grounds objects in 2D, lifts them into 3D geometric evidence, and aggregates this evidence into high-level spatial knowledge (\textit{e.g.}, counting, measurement, orientation, and relative position). Additionally, a temporal memory mechanism, including Scene Memory for maintaining the evolving scene state and Agent Memory for accumulating reasoning context, enables evidence integration across frames and reasoning steps. Comprehensive experiments on multi-view and video spatial reasoning benchmarks show that \textsc{S-Agent} consistently improves both open-source and closed-source VLMs in a training-free manner. Beyond inference-time augmentation, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on \textsc{S-Agent}-generated spatial trajectories \textsc{S-300K} yields \textsc{S-Agent-8B}, a compact spatial agent that significantly surpasses similar-scale baselines (e.g., Qwen3-VL-8B) and performs comparably to advanced closed-source models (e.g., GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3).

AI.tldr: S-Agent 提出了一种基于空间工具调用的智能体范式，通过将空间推理建模为时空证据累积过程，结合层次化空间工具和时序记忆机制，在无需额外训练的情况下显著提升多种VLM在连续多视图和视频空间推理任务上的性能，并通过对生成轨迹进行微调得到紧凑型空间智能体S-Agent-8B，达到与先进闭源模型相当的水平。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型和工具增强智能体在处理空间智能任务时主要依赖静态、无状态的单帧视觉观测进行推理，无法有效应对真实世界中对连续且动态演化的三维场景进行持续理解的需求，缺乏在时序维度上跨帧、跨视角积累空间证据的能力。
AI.method: S-Agent 将VLM作为语义规划器，决定需要何种空间证据，并通过层次化空间工具链（2D物体定位、3D几何证据提升、高级空间知识聚合）实现从帧级识别到场景级理解的转变；同时引入时序记忆机制，包括维护演化场景状态的场景记忆和累积推理上下文的智能体记忆，支持跨帧和跨推理步骤的证据整合。
AI.result: 在多视图和视频空间推理基准上的全面实验表明，S-Agent 以无需训练的方式一致提升了开源和闭源VLM的性能；基于S-Agent生成的空间轨迹数据S-300K进行监督微调得到的S-Agent-8B紧凑型空间智能体，显著超越类似规模的基线模型（如Qwen3-VL-8B），并与先进闭源模型（如GPT-5.4和Gemini 3）表现相当。
AI.conclusion: S-Agent 验证了将空间推理建模为时空证据累积过程的有效性，表明通过工具增强和记忆机制可以在不修改模型参数的情况下提升VLM的空间智能水平，同时利用生成的轨迹数据进行微调能够以较小模型规模获得与先进闭源模型竞争的空间推理能力，为构建具备持续三维场景理解能力的智能体提供了可行范式。

title: TimeProVe: Propose, then Verify for Efficient Long Video Temporal Reasoning in Activities of Daily Living
summary: Long Video Question Answering (LVQA) requires identifying sparse, query-relevant evidence within hours-long untrimmed videos. Existing approaches either process videos densely with large vision-language models (VLMs), incurring prohibitive computational cost, or rely on sparse caption-based reasoning, which often misses temporally localized and motion-centric evidence. We introduce TimeProVe, a cost-efficient hybrid framework for temporally grounded reasoning in long videos. TimeProVe first employs lightweight modules to generate action-grounded answer--evidence hypotheses and subsequently invokes an expensive VLM only for targeted verification. The core of our framework lies in the Action-based Candidate Evidence (ACE) module, which converts temporally localized actions into query-conditioned candidate answers and supporting evidence windows through lightweight LLM reasoning. We further introduce OpenTSUBench (OTB), an open-ended benchmark designed to evaluate temporally grounded reasoning in real-world Activities of Daily Living (ADL) scenarios. Experiments show that TimeProVe outperforms the strongest baseline on OTB by 7.3%, while reducing VLM calls by 75% and inference cost by 93%. Furthermore, without explicit temporal grounding training, TimeProVe achieves competitive performance on Charades-STA, and reaches state-of-the-art results when enhanced with grounding VLMs.

AI.tldr: TimeProVe提出了一种混合框架，先通过轻量级模块生成基于动作的答案-证据假设，再调用昂贵VLM进行目标验证，在长视频问答任务中以75%的VLM调用减少和93%的成本降低实现SOTA性能，并发布了面向日常活动场景的开放基准OTB。
AI.motivation: 长视频问答（LVQA）需要在数小时未裁剪视频中定位稀疏的查询相关证据，现有方法要么密集处理视频导致计算成本过高，要么依赖稀疏字幕推理但难以捕获时序定位和运动相关的证据，缺乏兼顾效率与时序推理能力的解决方案。
AI.method: TimeProVe采用两阶段混合框架：首先通过Action-based Candidate Evidence (ACE)模块利用轻量级LLM将时序定位的动作转换为查询条件下的候选答案和支持证据窗口，然后仅对生成的假设调用昂贵的VLM进行目标验证，从而在保持时序推理能力的同时大幅降低计算开销。
AI.result: TimeProVe在提出的开放基准OTB上以7.3%的性能提升超越最强基线，同时减少75%的VLM调用次数并降低93%的推理成本；在Charades-STA上无需显式时序定位训练即可达到竞争性能，结合时序定位VLM增强后达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过将轻量级推理与昂贵VLM验证解耦，TimeProVe证明了高效的时序推理在长视频问答中的可行性，同时OpenTSUBench为日常活动场景下的开放域时序推理评估提供了标准化基准，为低成本长视频理解研究指明了方向。

title: JanusMesh: Fast and Zero-Shot 3D Visual Illusion Generation via Cross-Space Denoising
summary: Creating 3D visual illusions, a single 3D mesh that reveals entirely different semantics from various viewing angles, is a fascinating but tough challenge. Existing optimization-based methods are slow and can produce oversaturated colors. In contrast, naive stitching approaches fail to produce geometrically coherent objects. This results in visible unnatural seams and semantic leaks. In this paper, we present a fast and training-free framework for generating text-driven 3D visual illusions. Our approach decouples the generation into two stages. First, we propose a cross-space dual-branch denoising process. This process dynamically decodes 3D latents into voxel space for CLIP-guided orientation alignment and Signed Distance Field (SDF) blending, which ensures seamless geometric fusion. Second, we introduce a view-conditioned texture synthesis module that projects and aggregates view-specific 2D diffusion priors onto the fused geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method generates highly realistic, dual-semantic 3D illusions in just 3-5 minutes. It significantly outperforms existing methods in geometric integrity, semantic recognizability, and efficiency. Project page: https://siang1105.github.io/JanusMesh.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种快速、无需训练的文本驱动3D视觉错觉生成框架JanusMesh，通过跨空间双分支去噪过程和视图条件纹理合成，能在3-5分钟内生成高保真双语义3D网格，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成3D视觉错觉的方法存在两大问题：基于优化的方法速度慢且易产生过饱和颜色，而朴素拼接方法无法生成几何连贯的对象，导致可见的非自然接缝和语义泄露。因此，亟需一种既能保证几何完整性和语义可识别性，又能高效生成3D视觉错觉的框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种两阶段、免训练的文本驱动3D视觉错觉生成框架。第一阶段提出跨空间双支路去噪过程，动态将3D潜变量解码到体素空间，用于CLIP引导的视角方向对齐和有符号距离场融合，确保无缝几何融合；第二阶段引入视图条件纹理合成模块，将视角特定的2D扩散先验投影并聚合到融合后的几何体上。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法仅需3-5分钟即可生成高度逼真的双语义3D错觉，在几何完整性、语义可识别性和生成效率方面显著优于现有优化方法和拼接方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过将几何融合与视图感知纹理生成解耦，可以在无需训练的前提下高效生成几何连贯、语义清晰的3D视觉错觉，为文本驱动的3D内容创作提供了新的高效范式。
